                    print_warning "Failed to download ClaudeUsage"
                fi
            else
                print_warning "Failed to fetch ClaudeUsage release URL"
            fi
        fi
    else
        # Linux/other OS
        echo "Font and GUI application installation is macOS-specific"
        log_verbose "Phase 9 operations skipped on $DETECTED_OS (safe to skip)"
    fi

    mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
}

phase_10_advanced_features() {
    [[ $(is_step_complete "advanced_features") == "true" ]] && return 0

    print_header "Phase 10: Advanced Features"

    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping Kubernetes init, cargo installs, and repo cloning"
        mark_step_complete "advanced_features"
        return 0
    fi

    # Kubernetes initialization
    if command_exists kubectl; then
        print_step "Initializing Kubernetes configuration..."
        mkdir -p "$HOME/.kube"
        touch "$HOME/.kube/config"
        chmod 600 "$HOME/.kube/config"

        # Initialize kubelogin for Azure (if installed)
        if command_exists kubelogin; then
            kubelogin convert-kubeconfig >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
                print_success "Azure kubelogin initialized" ||
                log_verbose "kubelogin initialization skipped"
        fi
        print_success "Kubernetes configuration initialized"
    fi

    # Rust tools installation (skip if binaries already exist)
    if command_exists cargo; then
        local cargo_to_install=()
        command_exists stylua || cargo_to_install+=(stylua)
        command_exists s3grep || cargo_to_install+=(s3grep)

        if [[ ${#cargo_to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
            print_step "Installing Rust development tools: ${cargo_to_install[*]}..."
            cargo install "${cargo_to_install[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
                print_success "Rust tools installed (${cargo_to_install[*]})" ||
                log_verbose "Rust tools installation completed with warnings"
        else
            print_success "Rust tools already installed (stylua, s3grep)"
        fi
    fi

    # Personal repositories (optional - check for SSH key)
    if [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_rsa" ]] || [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]]; then
        print_step "Cloning personal repositories..."

        # Clone Obsidian vault (if configured)
        local obsidian_repo="${OBSIDIAN_REPO:-}"
        if [[ -n "$obsidian_repo" ]] && [[ ! -d "$HOME/obsidian" ]]; then
            git clone "$obsidian_repo" "$HOME/obsidian" 2>/dev/null &&
                print_success "Obsidian vault cloned" ||
                log_verbose "Obsidian vault clone skipped"
        fi

        # Clone personal Neovim config (if configured)
        local nvim_repo="${NVIM_REPO:-}"
        if [[ -n "$nvim_repo" ]] && [[ ! -d "$HOME/neovim" ]]; then
            print_step "Cloning personal Neovim configuration..."
            git clone "$nvim_repo" "$HOME/neovim" 2>/dev/null &&
                print_success "Personal Neovim config cloned to ~/neovim" ||
                log_verbose "Neovim config clone skipped"

            # Create symlink in home directory (manual symlink, not managed by stow)
            if [[ -d "$HOME/neovim" ]]; then
                if [[ ! -L "$HOME/.config/nvim" ]]; then
                    ln -sf "$HOME/neovim" "$HOME/.config/nvim"
                    print_success "Created symlink: ~/.config/nvim → ~/neovim"
                fi

                # Trust mise configuration if mise is installed
                if command -v mise &>/dev/null && [[ -f "$HOME/neovim/mise.toml" ]]; then
                    mise trust "$HOME/neovim/mise.toml" &>/dev/null &&
                        print_success "Trusted mise configuration for Neovim" ||
                        log_verbose "mise trust skipped"
                fi

                # Configure persistent mise settings (only needed once, not every shell startup)
                if command -v mise &>/dev/null; then
                    mise settings add idiomatic_version_file_enable_tools ruby 2>/dev/null &&
                        print_success "Configured mise idiomatic version file for Ruby" ||
                        log_verbose "mise settings already configured"
                fi
            fi
        fi
    else
        log_verbose "No SSH keys found, skipping personal repository cloning"
    fi

    # Devcontainer Neovim Environment Setup
    # Sets up persistent directory structure for Neovim in devcontainers
    print_step "Setting up devcontainer Neovim environment..."
    local devcontainer_env="$HOME/.devcontainer/env"

    # Create directory structure
    mkdir -p "$devcontainer_env/.config" "$devcontainer_env/.cache" "$devcontainer_env/.local"

    # Symlink Neovim config if ~/neovim exists and not already linked
    if [[ -d "$HOME/neovim" ]] && [[ ! -L "$devcontainer_env/.config/nvim" ]]; then
        ln -sf "$HOME/neovim" "$devcontainer_env/.config/nvim"
        print_success "Linked: ~/.devcontainer/env/.config/nvim -> ~/neovim"
    elif [[ -L "$devcontainer_env/.config/nvim" ]]; then
        log_verbose "Devcontainer Neovim config already linked"
    else
        log_verbose "~/neovim not found - devcontainer will use empty config"
    fi

    print_success "Devcontainer environment ready at ~/.devcontainer/env"

    # Pre-export Claude Code credentials for devcontainer auto-login
    # Extracts OAuth tokens from macOS Keychain so devcontainers can authenticate automatically
    local export_script="$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/devcontainer/export-claude-credentials.sh"
    if [[ -f "$export_script" ]] && [[ "$(uname)" == "Darwin" ]]; then
        print_step "Exporting Claude Code credentials for devcontainer auto-login..."
        if bash "$export_script" 2>/dev/null; then
            print_success "Claude Code credentials exported to shared directory"
        else
            print_warning "No Claude Code credentials found - run 'claude login' first"
        fi
    fi

    # Install devcontainer.vim (universal Neovim for any devcontainer)
    if command_exists go && [[ ! -f "$HOME/go/bin/devcontainer.vim" ]]; then
        print_step "Installing devcontainer.vim..."
        go install github.com/mikoto2000/devcontainer.vim@latest >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
            print_success "devcontainer.vim installed" ||
            print_warning "devcontainer.vim installation failed (requires Go)"
    elif [[ -f "$HOME/go/bin/devcontainer.vim" ]]; then
        log_verbose "devcontainer.vim already installed"
    fi

    # Symlink claude-code-plugins devcontainer config from dotfiles
    # This ensures Neovim-enabled devcontainer config persists across plugin updates
    local claude_plugins_devcontainer="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-code-plugins/.devcontainer"
    local dotfiles_devcontainer="$DOTFILES_ROOT/devcontainer/claude-code-plugins"
    if [[ -d "$dotfiles_devcontainer" ]] && [[ ! -L "$claude_plugins_devcontainer" ]]; then
        print_step "Linking claude-code-plugins devcontainer config..."
        rm -rf "$claude_plugins_devcontainer" 2>/dev/null || true
        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$claude_plugins_devcontainer")"
        ln -sf "$dotfiles_devcontainer" "$claude_plugins_devcontainer"
        print_success "claude-code-plugins devcontainer linked from dotfiles"
    elif [[ -L "$claude_plugins_devcontainer" ]]; then
        log_verbose "claude-code-plugins devcontainer already linked"
    fi

    # Vault Semantic Search Setup (smart embeddings)
    # Runs independently of SSH keys - only requires ~/obsidian to exist
    if [[ -d "$HOME/obsidian" ]]; then
        local venv_dir="$DOTFILES_ROOT/.venv/vault-search"

        # Check if already set up (venv exists and has sentence-transformers)
        if [[ -d "$venv_dir" ]] && "$venv_dir/bin/python" -c "import sentence_transformers" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_verbose "Vault semantic search already configured"
        else
            print_step "Setting up Obsidian vault semantic search..."
            if "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/smart-connections/setup-vault-search.sh" "$HOME/obsidian" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                print_success "Vault semantic search configured"
            else
                print_warning "Vault semantic search setup failed (non-critical)"
            fi
        fi
    fi

    mark_step_complete "advanced_features"
}

phase_11_optional_features() {
    [[ $(is_step_complete "optional_features") == "true" ]] && return 0

    # Only run if explicitly enabled via environment variables
    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features"
        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping optional Nix/Pulse installations"
        mark_step_complete "optional_features"
        return 0
    fi
    if [[ "${ENABLE_NIX:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features - Nix Package Manager"

        if ! command_exists nix; then
            print_step "Installing Nix package manager (Determinate Systems installer)..."
            # Use Determinate Systems installer for better macOS support
            if curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf -L https://install.determinate.systems/nix | sh -s -- install --no-confirm </dev/null; then
                print_success "Nix package manager installed"
                # Source Nix for current session
                [[ -f '/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/etc/profile.d/nix-daemon.sh' ]] &&
                    source '/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/etc/profile.d/nix-daemon.sh'
            else
                print_warning "Nix installation failed - install manually from https://nixos.org/download"
            fi
        fi

        # Configure Nix
        if command_exists nix; then
            print_step "Configuring Nix..."
            mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/nix"

            # Create nix.conf with flakes and experimental features
            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.config/nix/nix.conf" ]]; then
                cat >"$HOME/.config/nix/nix.conf" <<'EOF'
# Enable experimental features
experimental-features = nix-command flakes

# Build settings
max-jobs = auto
cores = 0
sandbox = true

# Substituters (binary caches)
substituters = https://cache.nixos.org https://nix-community.cachix.org
trusted-public-keys = cache.nixos.org-1:REDACTED nix-community.cachix.org-1:REDACTED/rkCWyvRCYg3Fs=

# Garbage collection
keep-outputs = true
keep-derivations = true
EOF
                print_success "Nix configuration created"
            fi

            # Configure trusted users for Determinate Systems installer (macOS)
            if [[ "$DETECTED_OS" == "macos" ]] && [[ -f "/etc/nix/nix.custom.conf" ]]; then
                if ! sudo grep -q "^trusted-users.*@admin" /etc/nix/nix.custom.conf 2>/dev/null; then
                    print_step "Adding @admin to Nix trusted users..."
                    echo "trusted-users = root @admin" | sudo tee -a /etc/nix/nix.custom.conf >/dev/null
                    # Restart Nix daemon
                    if sudo launchctl list | grep -q "systems.determinate.nix-daemon"; then
                        sudo launchctl kickstart -k system/systems.determinate.nix-daemon
                    fi
                fi
            fi

            # Setup Home Manager
            print_step "Setting up Home Manager..."
            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.config/home-manager/flake.nix" ]]; then
                # Symlink Home Manager configuration from dotfiles if it exists
                if [[ -d "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/home-manager" ]]; then
                    rm -rf "$HOME/.config/home-manager" 2>/dev/null || true
                    ln -sf "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/home-manager" "$HOME/.config/home-manager"
                    print_success "Home Manager configuration symlinked from dotfiles"
                else
                    print_warning "Home Manager configuration not found in dotfiles"
                fi
            fi

            # Activate Home Manager if config exists
            if [[ -f "$HOME/.config/home-manager/flake.nix" ]]; then
                print_step "Activating Home Manager configuration..."
                if (cd "$HOME/.config/home-manager" && nix run . -- switch --flake .#default --impure 2>/dev/null); then
                    print_success "Home Manager activated for user: $USER"
                else
                    print_warning "Home Manager activation failed - run 'hm-switch' manually after restarting shell"
                fi
            fi

            # Setup Nix LSP hybrid mode
            print_step "Configuring Nix LSP hybrid setup..."

            # Install global LSPs
            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/install-lsps-global.sh" ]]; then
                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/install-lsps-global.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
                    log_verbose "Global LSPs installed"
            fi

            # Activate hybrid mode
            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/activate-nix-lsps.sh" ]]; then
                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/activate-nix-lsps.sh" hybrid >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
                    log_verbose "Nix LSP hybrid mode activated"
            fi

            # Check LSP status
            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/check-lsp-status.sh" ]]; then
                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/check-lsp-status.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
                    print_success "Nix LSP hybrid setup complete"
            fi
        fi
    fi

    if [[ "${ENABLE_PULSE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features - Pulse Coding Tracker"

        # Start Redis service (required for Pulse)
        print_step "Starting Redis service..."
        if command_exists brew; then
            brew services start redis 2>/dev/null || log_verbose "Redis service may already be running"
            print_success "Redis service started"
        elif command_exists systemctl; then
            sudo systemctl enable redis 2>/dev/null || true
            sudo systemctl start redis 2>/dev/null || true
            print_success "Redis service started (systemd)"
        else
            print_warning "Cannot start Redis service automatically"
        fi

        # Build and install Pulse binaries
        if ! command_exists pulse-server || ! command_exists pulse-client; then
            print_step "Building Pulse from source..."

            if ! command_exists go; then
                print_warning "Go not installed - cannot build Pulse. Install with: brew install go"
            else
                local pulse_dir="/tmp/pulse-build"
                rm -rf "$pulse_dir"
                mkdir -p "$HOME/bin"

                if git clone https://github.com/viccon/pulse.git "$pulse_dir" 2>/dev/null; then
                    cd "$pulse_dir" || true
                    if go build -o pulse-server ./cmd/server 2>/dev/null &&
                        go build -o pulse-client ./cmd/client 2>/dev/null; then
                        cp pulse-server "$HOME/bin/"
                        cp pulse-client "$HOME/bin/"
                        chmod +x "$HOME/bin/pulse-server" "$HOME/bin/pulse-client"
                        print_success "Pulse binaries installed to ~/bin/"
                    else
                        print_warning "Failed to build Pulse binaries"
                    fi
                    cd - >/dev/null || true
                    rm -rf "$pulse_dir"
                else
                    print_warning "Failed to clone Pulse repository"
                fi
            fi
        else
            log_verbose "Pulse binaries already installed"
        fi

        # Create Pulse configuration
        if command_exists pulse-server || [[ -f "$HOME/bin/pulse-server" ]]; then
            print_step "Configuring Pulse..."
            mkdir -p "$HOME/.pulse/logs" "$HOME/.pulse/data"

            # Create config.yaml if not exists
            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.pulse/config.yaml" ]]; then
                cat >"$HOME/.pulse/config.yaml" <<'EOF'
server:
  name: "pulse-server"
  host: "127.0.0.1"
  port: 8080

redis:
  host: localhost
  port: 6379
  db: 0

tracking:
  auto_start: true
  idle_timeout: 300
  save_interval: 60

projects:
  default_root: ~/code
EOF
                chmod 600 "$HOME/.pulse/config.yaml"
                print_success "Pulse configuration created"
            else
                log_verbose "Pulse configuration already exists"
            fi

            # Setup daemon (OS-specific)
            local pulse_binary
            if [[ -f "$HOME/bin/pulse-server" ]]; then
                pulse_binary="$HOME/bin/pulse-server"
            else
                pulse_binary="$(which pulse-server 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
            fi

            if [[ -n "$pulse_binary" ]]; then
                if [[ "$(uname -s)" == "Darwin" ]]; then
                    print_step "Setting up Pulse daemon (launchd)..."
                    local pulse_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/dev.shaheislam.pulse.plist"
                    mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents"

                    if [[ ! -f "$pulse_plist" ]]; then
                        cat >"$pulse_plist" <<EOF
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>Label</key>
    <string>dev.shaheislam.pulse</string>
    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
    <string>$HOME/.pulse/logs/stderr.log</string>
    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
    <string>$HOME/.pulse/logs/stdout.log</string>
    <key>EnvironmentVariables</key>
    <dict>
        <key>PATH</key>
        <string>/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$HOME/bin</string>
    </dict>
    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
    <array>
        <string>$pulse_binary</string>
    </array>
    <key>RunAtLoad</key>
    <true/>
    <key>KeepAlive</key>
    <true/>
</dict>
</plist>
EOF
                        launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$pulse_plist" 2>/dev/null || true
                        print_success "Pulse daemon configured and started"
                    else
                        log_verbose "Pulse daemon already configured"
                    fi
                else
                    # Linux systemd user service
                    print_step "Setting up Pulse daemon (systemd)..."
                    mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/systemd/user"
                    local pulse_service="$HOME/.config/systemd/user/pulse-tracker.service"

                    cat >"$pulse_service" <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=Pulse Coding Tracker
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=$pulse_binary
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=append:$HOME/.pulse/logs/stdout.log
StandardError=append:$HOME/.pulse/logs/stderr.log

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
EOF

                    systemctl --user daemon-reload 2>/dev/null || true
                    systemctl --user enable pulse-tracker.service 2>/dev/null || true
                    systemctl --user start pulse-tracker.service 2>/dev/null || true
                    print_success "Pulse daemon configured and started"
                fi
            fi

            print_success "Pulse tracker configured"
            echo "View logs: tail -f ~/.pulse/logs/stdout.log"
            echo "Query data: redis-cli KEYS \"*\""
        fi
    fi

    if [[ "${ENABLE_PIHOLE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features - Pi-hole DNS Ad Blocker"

        if [[ "$DETECTED_OS" != "macos" ]]; then
            print_warning "Pi-hole setup is macOS only (requires Colima). Skipping."
        else
            # Verify prerequisites
            if ! command_exists colima || ! command_exists docker; then
                print_warning "Pi-hole requires colima and docker CLI. Install via: brew bundle --file=$DOTFILES_ROOT/homebrew/Brewfile"
            else
                print_step "Setting up Pi-hole DNS ad blocker..."

                # Start Colima if not running
                if ! colima status &>/dev/null; then
                    print_step "Starting Colima..."
                    colima start --cpu 2 --memory 2 --disk 10 --runtime docker 2>/dev/null &&
                        print_success "Colima started" ||
                        print_warning "Colima start failed - start manually with: colima start"
                fi

                # Start Pi-hole container
                if colima status &>/dev/null; then
                    local pihole_compose="$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/pihole/docker-compose.yml"
                    if [[ -f "$pihole_compose" ]]; then
                        docker compose -f "$pihole_compose" up -d 2>/dev/null &&
                            print_success "Pi-hole container started" ||
                            print_warning "Pi-hole container start failed - run manually: ./scripts/pihole/setup-pihole.sh start"

                        print_success "Pi-hole DNS ad blocker configured"
                        echo "  Web Admin: http://localhost:8053/admin"
                        echo "  Activate:  ./scripts/pihole/setup-pihole.sh dns-on"
                        echo "  Status:    ./scripts/pihole/setup-pihole.sh status"
                    else
                        print_warning "Pi-hole docker-compose.yml not found at $pihole_compose"
                    fi
                fi
            fi
        fi
    fi

    if [[ "${ENABLE_SELFHOST_LLM:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features - Self-Hosted LLM Stack"

        if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup-selfhost-llm.sh" ]]; then
            print_step "Running self-hosted LLM setup (Ollama + Open WebUI)..."
            if bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup-selfhost-llm.sh"; then
                print_success "Self-hosted LLM stack installed"
            else
                print_warning "Self-hosted LLM setup had issues (non-critical)"
            fi
        else
            print_warning "Self-hosted LLM setup script not found"
        fi
    fi

    mark_step_complete "optional_features"
}

# ============================================================================
# Main
# ============================================================================

main() {
    parse_args "$@"
    load_modules

    # Clear completion state if requested (after modules load STATE_DIR)
    if [[ "${RESET_STATE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
        print_warning "Clearing completion state — all phases will re-run"
        clear_state
    fi

    preflight_checks
    show_summary

    # Run installation phases
    # Phases 1-4: sequential (each may depend on packages from earlier phases)
    phase_1_core_packages
    phase_2_cli_tools
    phase_3_development
    phase_4_cloud_tools

    # Phases 5-6: parallel (editors and multiplexer are independent)
    # Buffer output per phase to prevent interleaved terminal output
    local phase_fail=0
    phase_5_editors >"$LOG_DIR/phase5.out" 2>&1 &
    local pid_5=$!
    phase_6_multiplexer >"$LOG_DIR/phase6.out" 2>&1 &
    local pid_6=$!
    wait "$pid_5" || phase_fail=1
    wait "$pid_6" || phase_fail=1
    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase5.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase6.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
    [[ $phase_fail -ne 0 ]] && print_warning "Some parallel phases (5-6) had errors — check log for details"

    # Phases 7-8: sequential (shells setup writes to ~/.config/fish which stow also manages)
    phase_7_shells
    phase_8_dotfiles

    # Phase 9-10: parallel (fonts/apps and advanced features are independent)
    phase_fail=0
    phase_9_fonts_and_apps >"$LOG_DIR/phase9.out" 2>&1 &
    local pid_9=$!
    phase_10_advanced_features >"$LOG_DIR/phase10.out" 2>&1 &
    local pid_10=$!
    wait "$pid_9" || phase_fail=1
    wait "$pid_10" || phase_fail=1
    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase9.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase10.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
    [[ $phase_fail -ne 0 ]] && print_warning "Some parallel phases (9-10) had errors — check log for details"

    phase_11_optional_features

    # Success
    print_header "Setup Complete!"

    echo "Installation Summary:"
    echo "  OS: $DETECTED_OS"
    echo "  Profile: $PROFILE"
    echo "  Mode: $DETECTED_MODE"
    echo ""
    echo "Next Steps:"
    echo "  1. Restart your shell (or run: exec fish / source ~/.bashrc)"
    echo "  2. If using tmux: Start tmux and press Ctrl-s + I to install plugins"
    echo "  3. If using Neovim: Run 'nvim' to complete plugin installation"
    echo ""
    echo "Log file: $LOG_FILE"
    echo ""
    print_success "Setup complete"
}

# Run main
main "$@"

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: setup.sh reliability and correctness improvements

- Add source guards to common.sh and package-manager.sh to prevent
  redundant initialization (double network checks, double Homebrew init)
- Fix parallel pipx installs that can corrupt shared ~/.local/pipx state
  by making them sequential
- Add </dev/null to Homebrew and Oh My Zsh installers to prevent stdin
  consumption from parent script
- Set NONINTERACTIVE=1 for Homebrew installer
- Buffer parallel phase output to prevent interleaved terminal output
- Use brew for consul-template on macOS instead of manual download
- Use consistent ~/.local/bin instead of ~/bin for binary installs
- Add --reset-state flag to allow re-running completed phases
- Simplify overly complex Codex install fallback logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
**Summary of improvements made:**

1. **Source guards** prevent `common.sh` and `package-manager.sh` from re-initializing when sourced by multiple modules (was causing 2x network checks + 2x Homebrew init per run)
2. **Sequential pipx** — `pipx install` shares `~/.local/pipx` metadata; parallel writes corrupted installs
3. **Stdin protection** (`</dev/null` + `NONINTERACTIVE=1`) — without this, interactive installers steal stdin from the main setup script, causing it to hang or skip phases
4. **Buffered parallel output** — phases 5/6 and 9/10 now buffer to temp files, eliminating garbled interleaved output while keeping the speed benefit of parallelism
5. **`--reset-state`** — previously the only way to re-run completed phases was manually deleting `~/.dotfiles-setup/state/*`
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

# ============================================================================
# Installation Phases
# ============================================================================

phase_1_core_packages() {
    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
    [[ $(is_step_complete "core_packages") == "true" ]] && return 0

    print_header "Phase 1: Core Packages"

    pm_update

    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "core"

    # Enable Homebrew background auto-updates (daily update + upgrade + cleanup)
    if command_exists brew && brew tap | grep -q "domt4/autoupdate" 2>/dev/null; then
        if [[ "$DRY_RUN" != "true" ]]; then
            print_step "Enabling Homebrew background auto-updates..."
            brew autoupdate start --upgrade --cleanup --immediate 2>/dev/null &&
                print_success "Homebrew auto-update enabled (24h interval)" ||
                log_verbose "Homebrew auto-update configuration skipped"
        else
            print_warning "DRY RUN: Would enable Homebrew background auto-updates"
        fi
    fi

    mark_step_complete "core_packages"
}

phase_2_cli_tools() {
    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
    [[ $(is_step_complete "cli_tools") == "true" ]] && return 0

    print_header "Phase 2: CLI Tools"

    # Try package manager first
    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "cli_tools"

    # Install binaries for tools not in repos
    install_binaries_from_profile "$PROFILE"

    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping CLI tool post-install configuration"
        mark_step_complete "cli_tools"
        return 0
    fi

    # Configure bat with Catppuccin Mocha theme
    if command_exists bat; then
        print_step "Configuring bat with Catppuccin Mocha theme..."
        mkdir -p "$(bat --config-dir)/themes"
        if curl -sL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catppuccin/bat/main/themes/Catppuccin%20Mocha.tmTheme" \
            -o "$(bat --config-dir)/themes/Catppuccin Mocha.tmTheme"; then
            bat cache --build >/dev/null 2>&1
            echo '--theme="Catppuccin Mocha"' >"$(bat --config-dir)/config"
            print_success "Bat configured with Catppuccin Mocha theme"
        else
            print_warning "Failed to download Catppuccin Mocha theme for bat"
        fi

        # Rebuild bat cache for custom themes (handles version upgrades)
        if [[ -d "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/bat/themes" ]] || [[ -d "$(bat --config-dir)/themes" ]]; then
            bat cache --build >/dev/null 2>&1 &&

    75→    $0 --mode offline --offline-package ~/dotfiles-offline.tar.gz
    76→
    77→    # Dry run to preview
    78→    $0 --profile dev --dry-run
    79→
    80→    # Automated installation (CI/scripts)
    81→    $0 --profile minimal --no-confirm
    82→
    83→    # Enable optional features (Nix, Pulse, Pi-Hole, Self-Hosted LLM)
    84→    ENABLE_NIX=true ENABLE_PULSE=true ENABLE_PIHOLE=true ENABLE_SELFHOST_LLM=true $0 --profile comprehensive
    85→
    86→    # Clone personal repositories (set environment variables)
    87→    OBSIDIAN_REPO=git@github.com:user/obsidian.git \\
    88→    NVIM_REPO=git@github.com:user/nvim.git \\
    89→    $0 --profile standard
    90→
    91→ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES:
    92→    ENABLE_NIX=true         Enable Nix package manager installation (Phase 11)
    93→    ENABLE_PULSE=true       Enable Pulse coding tracker installation (Phase 11)
    94→    ENABLE_PIHOLE=true      Enable Pi-hole DNS ad blocker via Colima + Docker (Phase 11)
    95→    ENABLE_SELFHOST_LLM=true  Enable self-hosted LLM stack (Ollama + Open WebUI) (Phase 11)
    96→    OBSIDIAN_REPO=<url>     Clone Obsidian vault from repository (Phase 10)
    97→    NVIM_REPO=<url>         Clone personal Neovim config (Phase 10)
    98→
    99→For more information: https://github.com/shaheislam/dotfiles
   100→
   101→EOF
   102→}
   103→
   104→# ============================================================================
   105→# Parse Arguments
   106→# ============================================================================
   107→
   108→parse_args() {
   109→    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
   110→        case $1 in
   111→        --profile)
   112→            PROFILE="$2"
   113→            shift 2
   114→            ;;
   115→        --os)
   116→            OS="$2"
   117→            shift 2
   118→            ;;
   119→        --mode)
   120→            MODE="$2"
   121→            shift 2
   122→            ;;
   123→        --offline-package)
   124→            OFFLINE_PACKAGE="$2"
   125→            MODE="offline"
   126→            shift 2
   127→            ;;
   128→        --dry-run)
   129→            DRY_RUN=true
   130→            shift
   131→            ;;
   132→        --no-confirm)
   133→            NO_CONFIRM=true
   134→            shift
   135→            ;;
   136→        --verbose)
   137→            VERBOSE=true
   138→            shift
   139→            ;;
   140→        --skip-packages)
   141→            SKIP_PACKAGES=true
   142→            shift
   143→            ;;
   144→        --skip-dotfiles)
   145→            SKIP_DOTFILES=true
   146→            shift
   147→            ;;
   148→        --skip-shells)
   149→            SKIP_SHELLS=true
   150→            shift
   151→            ;;
   152→        --skip-fonts-apps)
   153→            SKIP_FONTS_APPS=true
   154→            shift
   155→            ;;
   156→        --reset-state)
   157→            RESET_STATE=true
   158→            shift
   159→            ;;
   160→        -h | --help)
   161→            show_help
   162→            exit 0
   163→            ;;
   164→        *)
   165→            echo "Unknown option: $1"
   166→            show_help
   167→            exit 1
   168→            ;;
   169→        esac
   170→    done
   171→
   172→    # Export for child modules
   173→    export PROFILE DRY_RUN NO_CONFIRM VERBOSE SKIP_PACKAGES SKIP_DOTFILES SKIP_SHELLS SKIP_FONTS_APPS
   174→    export DOTFILES_ROOT SCRIPT_DIR
   175→}
   176→
   177→# ============================================================================
   178→# Load Modules
   179→# ============================================================================
   180→
   181→load_modules() {
   182→    # Load common utilities
   183→    # shellcheck source=./lib/common.sh
   184→    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/common.sh"
   185→
   186→    # Load package manager
   187→    # shellcheck source=./lib/package-manager.sh
   188→    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/package-manager.sh"
   189→
   190→    # Load other modules
   191→    # shellcheck source=./lib/binary-installer.sh
   192→    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/binary-installer.sh"
   193→
   194→    # shellcheck source=./lib/shell-setup.sh
   195→    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/shell-setup.sh"
   196→
   197→    # shellcheck source=./lib/dotfiles-manager.sh
   198→    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/dotfiles-manager.sh"
   199→}
   200→
   201→# ============================================================================
   202→# Preflight Checks
   203→# ============================================================================
   204→
   205→preflight_checks() {
   206→    print_header "Preflight Checks"
   207→
   208→    # Check disk space
   209→    if ! check_disk_space 500; then
   210→        print_error "Insufficient disk space"
   211→        exit 1
   212→    fi
   213→
   214→    # Check required commands
   215→    if ! check_required_commands bash curl; then
   216→        print_error "Missing required commands"
   217→        exit 1
   218→    fi
   219→
   220→    # Check profile exists
   221→    if [[ ! -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/profiles/$PROFILE.conf" ]]; then
   222→        print_error "Profile not found: $PROFILE"
   223→        print_warning "Available profiles: minimal, standard, comprehensive, dev, ops"
   224→        exit 1
   225→    fi
   226→
   227→    # Detect OS if auto
   228→    if [[ "$OS" == "auto" ]]; then
   229→        OS=$(detect_os)
   230→        print_success "Detected OS: $OS"
   231→    fi
   232→
   233→    # Load OS-specific package manager
   234→    if ! load_package_manager; then
   235→        print_error "Failed to load package manager"
   236→        exit 1
   237→    fi
   238→
   239→    # Detect mode if auto
   240→    if [[ "$MODE" == "auto" ]]; then
   241→        MODE=$(detect_installation_mode)
   242→        print_success "Installation mode: $MODE"
   243→    fi
   244→
   245→    print_success "Preflight checks passed"
   246→}

   248→# ============================================================================
   249→# Display Summary
   250→# ============================================================================
   251→
   252→show_summary() {
   253→    print_header "Installation Summary"
   254→
   255→    echo "Operating System: $DETECTED_OS"
   256→    echo "Architecture: $DETECTED_ARCH"
   257→    echo "Profile: $PROFILE"
   258→    echo "Mode: $DETECTED_MODE"
   259→    echo "Sudo Access: ${HAS_SUDO:-false}"
   260→    echo ""
   261→
   262→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
   263→        print_warning "DRY RUN MODE - No changes will be made"
   264→        echo ""
   265→    fi
   266→
   267→    # Auto-proceed — no interactive confirmation needed
   268→
   269→}

   271→# ============================================================================
   272→# Installation Phases
   273→# ============================================================================
   274→
   275→phase_1_core_packages() {
   276→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
   277→    [[ $(is_step_complete "core_packages") == "true" ]] && return 0
   278→
   279→    print_header "Phase 1: Core Packages"
   280→
   281→    pm_update
   282→
   283→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "core"
   284→
   285→    # Enable Homebrew background auto-updates (daily update + upgrade + cleanup)
   286→    if command_exists brew && brew tap | grep -q "domt4/autoupdate" 2>/dev/null; then
   287→        if [[ "$DRY_RUN" != "true" ]]; then
   288→            print_step "Enabling Homebrew background auto-updates..."
   289→            brew autoupdate start --upgrade --cleanup --immediate 2>/dev/null &&
   290→                print_success "Homebrew auto-update enabled (24h interval)" ||
   291→                log_verbose "Homebrew auto-update configuration skipped"
   292→        else
   293→            print_warning "DRY RUN: Would enable Homebrew background auto-updates"
   294→        fi
   295→    fi
   296→
   297→    mark_step_complete "core_packages"
   298→}
   299→
   300→phase_2_cli_tools() {

300→phase_2_cli_tools() {
   301→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
   302→    [[ $(is_step_complete "cli_tools") == "true" ]] && return 0
   303→
   304→    print_header "Phase 2: CLI Tools"
   305→
   306→    # Try package manager first
   307→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "cli_tools"
   308→
   309→    # Install binaries for tools not in repos
   310→    install_binaries_from_profile "$PROFILE"
   311→
   312→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
   313→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping CLI tool post-install configuration"
   314→        mark_step_complete "cli_tools"
   315→        return 0
   316→    fi
   317→
   318→    # Configure bat with Catppuccin Mocha theme
   319→    if command_exists bat; then
   320→        print_step "Configuring bat with Catppuccin Mocha theme..."
   321→        mkdir -p "$(bat --config-dir)/themes"
   322→        if curl -sL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/catppuccin/bat/main/themes/Catppuccin%20Mocha.tmTheme" \
   323→            -o "$(bat --config-dir)/themes/Catppuccin Mocha.tmTheme"; then
   324→            bat cache --build >/dev/null 2>&1
   325→            echo '--theme="Catppuccin Mocha"' >"$(bat --config-dir)/config"
   326→            print_success "Bat configured with Catppuccin Mocha theme"
   327→        else
   328→            print_warning "Failed to download Catppuccin Mocha theme for bat"
   329→        fi
   330→
   331→        # Rebuild bat cache for custom themes (handles version upgrades)
   332→        if [[ -d "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/bat/themes" ]] || [[ -d "$(bat --config-dir)/themes" ]]; then
   333→            bat cache --build >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   334→                print_success "bat cache rebuilt for custom themes" || true
   335→        fi
   336→    fi
   337→
   338→    mark_step_complete "cli_tools"
   339→}
   340→
   341→phase_3_development() {
   342→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
   343→    [[ $(is_step_complete "development") == "true" ]] && return 0
   344→
   345→    print_header "Phase 3: Development Tools"
   346→
   347→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "development"
   348→
   349→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
   350→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping language toolchain installers and pipx installs"
   351→        mark_step_complete "development"
   352→        return 0
   353→    fi
   354→
   355→    # Node.js via nvm
   356→    if [[ $(get_package_list_from_profile "$PROFILE" "development") =~ nodejs ]]; then
   357→        # Check if Node.js is already installed (via Homebrew, system, or nvm)
   358→        if command_exists node; then
   359→            print_success "Node.js already installed: $(node --version)"
   360→            log_verbose "Skipping nvm installation"
   361→        elif [[ -d "$HOME/.nvm" ]]; then
   362→            print_success "nvm already installed"
   363→            export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
   364→            [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
   365→        else
   366→            print_step "Installing Node.js via nvm..."
   367→            curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash </dev/null
   368→            export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
   369→            [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
   370→            nvm install 22
   371→        fi
   372→
   373→        # Install Node.js global packages
   374→        if command_exists npm; then
   375→            print_step "Installing Node.js global packages..."
   376→            # Install prettierd and prettier-plugin-toml
   377→            if command_exists bun; then
   378→                bun install -g @fsouza/prettierd prettier-plugin-toml >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
   379→                    npm install -g @fsouza/prettierd prettier-plugin-toml >/dev/null 2>&1
   380→            else
   381→                npm install -g @fsouza/prettierd prettier-plugin-toml >/dev/null 2>&1
   382→            fi
   383→            print_success "Installed prettierd and prettier-plugin-toml"
   384→        fi
   385→    fi
   386→
   387→    # Rust via rustup
   388→    if [[ $(get_package_list_from_profile "$PROFILE" "development") =~ rust ]]; then
   389→        # Check if Rust is already installed
   390→        if command_exists rustc; then
   391→            print_success "Rust already installed: $(rustc --version)"
   392→            log_verbose "Skipping rustup installation"
   393→        elif [[ -d "$HOME/.cargo" ]]; then
   394→            print_success "Rust toolchain already installed"
   395→            source "$HOME/.cargo/env" 2>/dev/null || true
   396→        else
   397→            print_step "Installing Rust via rustup..."
   398→            curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y </dev/null
   399→            source "$HOME/.cargo/env"
   400→        fi
   401→    fi
   402→
   403→    # Install Python MCP servers via pipx (sequential — pipx shares ~/.local/pipx state)
   404→    if command_exists pipx; then
   405→        print_step "Installing Python-based MCP servers..."
   406→        local pipx_pkgs=(mcp-server-git mcp-server-fetch mcp-server-sqlite diagrams hookify websockets)
   407→        for pkg in "${pipx_pkgs[@]}"; do
   408→            pipx install "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1 || log_verbose "pipx install $pkg skipped (may already exist)"
   409→        done
   410→        print_success "Python MCP servers installation complete"
   411→    fi
   412→
   413→    mark_step_complete "development"
   414→}
   415→
   416→phase_4_cloud_tools() {
   417→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
   418→    [[ $(is_step_complete "cloud_tools") == "true" ]] && return 0
   419→
   420→    print_header "Phase 4: Cloud & Infrastructure Tools"
   421→
   422→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "cloud"
   423→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "kubernetes"
   424→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "containers"
   425→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "security"
   426→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "monitoring"
   427→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "network"
   428→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "performance"
   429→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "data"
   430→
   431→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
   432→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping cloud tool post-install steps and MCP configuration"
   433→        mark_step_complete "cloud_tools"
   434→        return 0
   435→    fi
   436→
   437→    # Claude Code CLI - native installer (auto-updates, no Node.js dependency)
   438→    # Reference: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup
   439→    print_step "Checking Claude Code CLI..."
   440→
   441→    # Migrate from Homebrew to native installer (one-time cleanup)
   442→    if brew list --cask claude-code >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   443→        print_step "Migrating Claude Code from Homebrew to native installer..."
   444→        brew uninstall --cask claude-code >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   445→        print_success "Homebrew Claude Code removed (migrating to native)"
   446→    fi
   447→
   448→    # Clean up legacy installations (only if remnants exist — skip slow npm/bun scans otherwise)
   449→    if [[ -d "$HOME/.claude/local" ]]; then
   450→        rm -rf "$HOME/.claude/local" 2>/dev/null || true
   451→    fi
   452→    if [[ -d "/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code" ]]; then
   453→        npm uninstall -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   454→        rm -rf /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null || true
   455→    fi
   456→    if command_exists bun && bun pm ls -g 2>/dev/null | grep -q "@anthropic-ai/claude-code"; then
   457→        bun remove -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   458→    fi
   459→    rm -rf "$HOME/.npm/_npx/@anthropic-ai/claude-code" 2>/dev/null || true
   460→    rm -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/bin/claude" 2>/dev/null || true
   461→
   462→    # Always install/upgrade via native installer on latest channel
   463→    # The installer is idempotent — safe to run every time
   464→    print_step "Installing/updating Claude Code (latest channel)..."
   465→    # Close stdin (</dev/null) so the piped bash can't consume the parent script's input stream
   466→    if curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash -s -- latest </dev/null 2>&1; then
   467→        print_success "Claude Code installed (latest channel): $(claude --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'version check failed')"
   468→    else
   469→        print_warning "Failed to install Claude Code - install manually: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | sh -s -- latest"
   470→    fi
   471→
   472→    # Verify installation health
   473→    if command_exists claude; then
   474→        claude doctor >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   475→            print_success "Claude Code doctor check passed" ||
   476→            log_verbose "Claude Code doctor reported warnings (non-fatal)"
   477→    fi
   478→
   479→    # Install independent CLI tools
   480→    print_step "Installing CLI tools..."
   481→
   482→    _install_recall() {
   483→        if ! command_exists recall; then
   484→            brew install zippoxer/tap/recall >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   485→                print_success "recall installed" ||
   486→                print_warning "Failed to install recall"
   487→        else
   488→            print_success "recall already installed"
   489→        fi
   490→    }
   491→
   492→    _install_beads() {
   493→        if ! command_exists bd; then
   494→            brew install beads >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   495→                print_success "beads installed" ||
   496→                print_warning "Failed to install beads"
   497→        else
   498→            print_success "beads CLI already installed"
   499→        fi
   500→    }
   501→
   502→    _install_entire() {
   503→        if ! command_exists entire; then
   504→            brew tap entireio/tap >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   505→            brew install entireio/tap/entire >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   506→                print_success "entire installed" ||
   507→                print_warning "Failed to install entire"
   508→        else
   509→            print_success "entire CLI already installed"
   510→        fi
   511→    }
   512→
   513→    _install_ccr() {
   514→        if ! command_exists ccr; then
   515→            if command_exists bun; then
   516→                bun install -g @musistudio/claude-code-router >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   517→                    print_success "Claude Code Router installed" ||
   518→                    print_warning "Failed to install Claude Code Router"
   519→            elif command_exists npm; then
   520→                npm install -g @musistudio/claude-code-router >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   521→                    print_success "Claude Code Router installed" ||
   522→                    print_warning "Failed to install Claude Code Router"
   523→            fi
   524→        else
   525→            print_success "Claude Code Router already installed"
   526→        fi
   527→    }
   528→
   529→    _install_codex() {
   530→        if ! command_exists codex; then
   531→            if command_exists bun; then
   532→                bun add -g @openai/codex >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
   533→                    log_verbose "OpenAI Codex CLI installation skipped (optional)"
   534→            elif command_exists npm; then
   535→                npm install -g @openai/codex >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
   536→                    log_verbose "OpenAI Codex CLI installation skipped (optional)"
   537→            fi
   538→        fi
   539→    }
   540→
   541→    _install_openclaw() {
   542→        if ! command_exists openclaw; then
   543→            brew install openclaw-cli >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
   544→                log_verbose "OpenClaw CLI installation skipped (optional)"
   545→        fi
   546→    }
   547→
   548→    # Run tool installs sequentially (brew doesn't support parallel operations)
   549→    _install_recall
   550→    _install_beads
   551→    _install_entire
   552→    _install_ccr
   553→    _install_codex
   554→    _install_openclaw
   555→
   556→    # Post-install: beads hooks (depends on beads being installed)
   557→    if command_exists bd; then
   558→        print_step "Configuring beads Claude Code hooks..."
   559→        bd setup claude >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   560→            print_success "Beads hooks installed" ||
   561→            log_verbose "Beads hook setup skipped"
   562→    fi
   563→
   564→    # Setup Claude Code Router configuration
   565→    if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/claude-code-router/config.json" ]] && [[ ! -f "$HOME/.claude-code-router/config.json" ]]; then
   566→        print_step "Setting up Claude Code Router configuration..."
   567→        mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude-code-router"
   568→        ln -sf "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/claude-code-router/config.json" "$HOME/.claude-code-router/config.json"
   569→        print_success "Claude Code Router configuration linked from dotfiles"
   570→    fi
   571→
   572→    # Configure OpenClaw with security-hardened defaults
   573→    if command_exists openclaw; then
   574→        if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json" ]]; then
   575→            print_step "Configuring OpenClaw with secure defaults..."
   576→            mkdir -p "$HOME/.openclaw"
   577→            chmod 700 "$HOME/.openclaw"
   578→            cp "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/openclaw/openclaw-base.json" "$HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json"
   579→            chmod 600 "$HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json"
   580→
   581→            # Generate gateway token
   582→            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.openclaw/.env" ]]; then
   583→                local oc_token
   584→                oc_token=$(openssl rand -hex 32)
   585→                cat >"$HOME/.openclaw/.env" <<OCEOF
   586→# OpenClaw Gateway Authentication
   587→# Generated: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
   588→OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=${oc_token}
   589→OCEOF
   590→                chmod 600 "$HOME/.openclaw/.env"
   591→            fi
   592→            print_success "OpenClaw configured with secure defaults"
   593→        else
   594→            print_success "OpenClaw configuration already exists"
   595→        fi
   596→
   597→        # Generate exec-approvals.json with secure defaults
   598→        if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json" ]]; then
   599→            print_step "Creating exec-approvals.json with secure defaults..."

600→            cat >"$HOME/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json" <<'EAEOF'
   601→{
   602→  "defaults": {
   603→    "require": true,
   604→    "skillAutoAllow": false,
   605→    "allowlist": []
   606→  },
   607→  "agents": {}
   608→}
   609→EAEOF
   610→            chmod 600 "$HOME/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json"
   611→            print_success "Exec approvals configured (require=true, no auto-allow)"
   612→        fi
   613→
   614→        # Install launchd service on macOS
   615→        if [[ "$DETECTED_OS" == "macos" ]]; then
   616→            openclaw gateway install >/dev/null 2>&1 || log_verbose "OpenClaw launchd service setup skipped"
   617→        fi
   618→    fi
   619→
   620→    # Install iximiuz labctl CLI
   621→    if ! command_exists labctl; then
   622→        print_step "Installing iximiuz labctl CLI..."
   623→        if curl -sf https://labs.iximiuz.com/cli/install.sh | sh </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   624→            print_success "iximiuz labctl CLI installed"
   625→        else
   626→            log_verbose "iximiuz labctl installation skipped (optional)"
   627→        fi
   628→    else
   629→        print_success "iximiuz labctl CLI already installed at: $(which labctl)"
   630→    fi
   631→
   632→    # Configure Claude Code MCP servers
   633→    if command_exists claude; then
   634→        print_step "Configuring Claude Code MCP servers..."
   635→
   636→        # Core MCP servers (sequential — all write to shared settings.json)
   637→        claude mcp add --scope user context7 bunx @upstash/context7-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

   642→        # ClaudeCodeBrowser - Firefox browser automation for Claude Code
   643→        # See docs/claudecodebrowser-security-assessment.md for security details
   644→        CCB_DIR="$HOME/.claudecodebrowser"
   645→        if [ ! -d "$CCB_DIR" ]; then
   646→            print_step "Installing ClaudeCodeBrowser..."
   647→            git clone https://github.com/nanogenomic/ClaudeCodeBrowser.git "$CCB_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 || print_warning "Failed to clone ClaudeCodeBrowser"

   650→            (cd "$CCB_DIR" && git pull >/dev/null 2>&1) || print_warning "Failed to update ClaudeCodeBrowser"
   651→        fi
   652→
   653→        if [ -d "$CCB_DIR" ]; then
   654→            # CORS hardening - replace wildcard origin with dynamic moz-extension:// allowlist
   655→            # Rejects file://, http://, sandboxed iframe, and arbitrary web page origins
   656→            # Only patch if not already patched (idempotent)
   657→            if [ -f "$CCB_DIR/mcp-server/server.py" ] && ! grep -q "_get_cors_origin" "$CCB_DIR/mcp-server/server.py"; then
   658→                python3 - "$CCB_DIR/mcp-server/server.py" <<'CORSPATCH'
   659→import sys, re
   660→path = sys.argv[1]
   661→with open(path, 'r') as f:
   662→    content = f.read()
   663→# Add _get_cors_origin helper method after class definition line
   664→helper = '''
   665→    def _get_cors_origin(self):
   666→        """Return CORS origin only for moz-extension:// requests."""
   667→        origin = self.headers.get('Origin', '')
   668→        if origin.startswith('moz-extension://'):
   669→            return origin
   670→        return ''
   671→'''
   672→# Insert helper after log_message method
   673→content = re.sub(
   674→    r"(    def log_message\(self, format, \*args\):\n        logger\.info\(f\"HTTP: \{format % args\}\"\)\n)",
   675→    r"\1" + helper,
   676→    content
   677→)
   678→# Replace static CORS headers with dynamic calls
   679→content = content.replace(
   680→    "self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')",
   681→    "self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', self._get_cors_origin())"
   682→)
   683→content = content.replace(
   684→    "self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', 'null')",
   685→    "self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', self._get_cors_origin())"
   686→)
   687→with open(path, 'w') as f:
   688→    f.write(content)
   689→print("CORS patched: moz-extension:// allowlist")
   690→CORSPATCH
   691→            fi
   692→
   693→            # Make scripts executable
   694→            chmod +x "$CCB_DIR"/native-host/*.py "$CCB_DIR"/mcp-server/*.py 2>/dev/null || true

   939→phase_5_editors() {
   940→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0

   942→

   952→
   953→    # Install Neovim plugins automatically

   956→        nvim --headless "+Lazy! sync" +qa >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   957→            print_success "Neovim plugins installed successfully" ||

   959→
   960→        # Install pynvim for Python support
   961→        if command_exists python3; then
   962→            print_step "Installing pynvim for Neovim Python support..."
   963→            python3 -m pip install --user pynvim >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   964→                print_success "pynvim installed" ||

   966→        fi
   967→    fi

   969→    mark_step_complete "editors"
   970→}

   972→phase_6_multiplexer() {
   973→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
   974→    [[ $(is_step_complete "multiplexer") == "true" ]] && return 0
   975→
   976→    print_header "Phase 6: Terminal Multiplexer"
   977→
   978→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "multiplexer"
   979→
   980→    # Install 1Password CLI (required by tmux-1password plugin)
   981→    if ! command_exists op; then
   982→        print_step "Installing 1Password CLI (required by tmux-1password plugin)..."
   983→        brew install --cask 1password-cli >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
   984→            print_success "1Password CLI installed" ||
   985→            print_warning "Failed to install 1Password CLI - install manually with: brew install --cask 1password-cli"
   986→    else
   987→        print_success "1Password CLI already installed"
   988→    fi
   989→
   990→    # Install TPM
   991→    if command_exists tmux && [[ ! -d "$HOME/.tmux/plugins/tpm" ]]; then
   992→        print_step "Installing Tmux Plugin Manager..."
   993→        git clone https://github.com/tmux-plugins/tpm "$HOME/.tmux/plugins/tpm"
   994→    fi
   995→
   996→    # Manually install tmux plugins (ensures immediate availability)
   997→    if command_exists tmux && [[ -d "$HOME/.tmux/plugins/tpm" ]]; then
   998→        print_step "Installing tmux plugins..."
   999→

999→
  1000→        local plugins_dir="$HOME/.tmux/plugins"
  1001→        # Plugin list synced with .tmux.conf - TPM clean_plugins removes unlisted ones
  1002→        local tmux_plugins=(
  1003→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-sensible"
  1004→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-yank"
  1005→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-prefix-highlight"
  1006→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-open"
  1007→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-copycat"
  1008→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-pain-control"
  1009→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-sidebar"
  1010→            "tmux-plugins/tmux-cpu"
  1011→            "christoomey/vim-tmux-navigator" # Vim/tmux seamless navigation
  1012→            "fcsonline/tmux-thumbs"          # Rust-based text hints
  1013→            "laktak/extrakto"                # Text extraction with FZF
  1014→            "rickstaa/tmux-notify"           # macOS notification on command completion
  1015→            "yardnsm/tmux-1password"         # 1Password integration
  1016→            "roosta/tmux-fuzzback"           # FZF scrollback search
  1017→            "sainnhe/tmux-fzf"               # FZF integration for tmux
  1018→            "azorng/tmux-smooth-scroll"      # Smooth scrolling
  1019→            "fabioluciano/tmux-powerkit"     # Status bar powerline theme
  1020→        )
  1021→
  1022→        # Clone missing plugins in parallel
  1023→        local clone_pids=()
  1024→        for plugin in "${tmux_plugins[@]}"; do
  1025→            local plugin_name="${plugin##*/}"
  1026→            if [[ ! -d "$plugins_dir/$plugin_name" ]]; then
  1027→                log_verbose "Installing $plugin_name..."
  1028→                git clone "https://github.com/$plugin.git" "$plugins_dir/$plugin_name" 2>/dev/null &
  1029→                clone_pids+=($!)
  1030→            fi
  1031→        done
  1032→        # Wait for all parallel clones to finish
  1033→        for pid in "${clone_pids[@]}"; do
  1034→            wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  1035→        done
  1036→
  1037→        print_success "Tmux plugins installed"
  1038→
  1039→        # Build tmux-thumbs only if binary doesn't exist (skip expensive Rust compilation)
  1040→        if [[ -d "$plugins_dir/tmux-thumbs" ]] && command_exists cargo; then
  1041→            if [[ ! -f "$plugins_dir/tmux-thumbs/target/release/tmux-thumbs" ]]; then
  1042→                print_step "Building tmux-thumbs..."
  1043→                (cd "$plugins_dir/tmux-thumbs" &&
  1044→                    SDKROOT=$(xcrun --sdk macosx --show-sdk-path) \
  1045→                    LIBRARY_PATH="$(xcrun --sdk macosx --show-sdk-path)/usr/lib" \
  1046→                        cargo build --release) >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1047→                    print_success "tmux-thumbs built" ||
  1048→                    log_verbose "tmux-thumbs build failed (run manually: cd ~/.tmux/plugins/tmux-thumbs && SDKROOT=\$(xcrun --sdk macosx --show-sdk-path) cargo build --release)"
  1049→            else
  1050→                print_success "tmux-thumbs already built"
  1051→            fi
  1052→        fi
  1053→
  1054→        # Update plugins and clean stale ones via TPM (skip update if we just cloned fresh)
  1055→        if [[ ${#clone_pids[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
  1056→            print_step "Updating tmux plugins..."
  1057→            "$HOME/.tmux/plugins/tpm/bin/update_plugins" all >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1058→                log_verbose "Tmux plugins updated" ||
  1059→                log_verbose "Tmux plugin update completed with warnings"
  1060→        else
  1061→            log_verbose "Skipping plugin update (just cloned fresh)"
  1062→        fi
  1063→        "$HOME/.tmux/plugins/tpm/bin/clean_plugins" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1064→            log_verbose "Stale tmux plugins cleaned" ||
  1065→            log_verbose "Tmux plugin cleanup completed with warnings"
  1066→        print_success "Tmux plugins synchronized"
  1067→
  1068→        # Reload tmux config if tmux server is running
  1069→        if tmux list-sessions >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1070→            print_step "Reloading tmux configuration..."
  1071→            tmux source-file "$HOME/.tmux.conf" 2>/dev/null &&
  1072→                print_success "Tmux configuration reloaded" ||
  1073→                log_verbose "Tmux config reload completed with warnings"
  1074→        fi
  1075→    fi
  1076→
  1077→    # Apply Dracula theme customizations
  1078→    if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup-tmux-dracula.sh" ]]; then
  1079→        print_step "Applying Dracula theme customizations..."
  1080→        bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup-tmux-dracula.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1081→            print_success "Dracula theme customizations applied" ||
  1082→            log_verbose "Dracula theme setup completed with warnings"
  1083→    fi
  1084→
  1085→    # Reset Claude activity watcher daemon
  1086→    if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tmux/tmux-claude-watcher.sh" ]]; then
  1087→        print_step "Resetting Claude activity watcher..."
  1088→        "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tmux/tmux-claude-watcher.sh" stop 2>/dev/null
  1089→        "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tmux/tmux-claude-watcher.sh" start </dev/null 2>/dev/null
  1090→        print_success "Claude watcher restarted"
  1091→    fi
  1092→
  1093→    mark_step_complete "multiplexer"
  1094→}

  1130→phase_8_dotfiles() {
  1131→    [[ "$SKIP_DOTFILES" == "true" ]] && return 0
  1132→    [[ $(is_step_complete "dotfiles") == "true" ]] && return 0
  1133→
  1134→    print_header "Phase 8: Dotfiles"
  1135→
  1136→    stow_dotfiles
  1137→
  1138→    # Configure git template directory for auto-setup hooks (e.g., .gitignore_local)
  1139→    if command_exists git; then
  1140→        git config --global init.templateDir ~/.config/git/templates
  1141→        log_verbose "Git template directory configured"
  1142→
  1143→        # Register union-doc merge driver for documentation files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md)
  1144→        # Prevents merge conflicts when multiple worktrees append to the same doc files
  1145→        git config --global merge.union-doc.name "Union merge for documentation files"
  1146→        git config --global merge.union-doc.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-union.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1147→        log_verbose "Union-doc merge driver registered"
  1148→
  1149→        # Register Brewfile merge driver - union merge + dedup of tap/brew/cask/mas
  1150→        git config --global merge.brewfile.name "Union merge for Brewfile"
  1151→        git config --global merge.brewfile.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-brewfile.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1152→        log_verbose "Brewfile merge driver registered"
  1153→
  1154→        # Register JSON deep-merge driver for settings files
  1155→        git config --global merge.json-merge.name "Deep merge for JSON config files"
  1156→        git config --global merge.json-merge.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-json.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1157→        log_verbose "JSON merge driver registered"
  1158→
  1159→        # Register lockfile merge driver - keeps ours for auto-generated lockfiles
  1160→        git config --global merge.lockfile.name "Keep ours for lockfiles"
  1161→        git config --global merge.lockfile.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-lockfile.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1162→        log_verbose "Lockfile merge driver registered"
  1163→
  1164→        # Register JSON diff driver - sorts keys for cleaner diffs
  1165→        git config --global diff.json.textconv "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/git-diff-json.sh"
  1166→        log_verbose "JSON diff driver registered"
  1167→
  1168→        # Register JSON clean filter - normalizes key order on commit
  1169→        # Prevents phantom diffs from tools that re-serialize JSON (e.g., Claude Code)
  1170→        git config --global filter.json-normalize.clean "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/git-clean-json.sh"
  1171→        log_verbose "JSON normalize filter registered"
  1172→
  1173→        # Register plist diff driver - converts to XML for readable diffs
  1174→        git config --global diff.plist.textconv "plutil -convert xml1 -o -"
  1175→        log_verbose "Plist diff driver registered"
  1176→    fi
  1177→
  1178→    # Setup local git excludes (.gitignore_local symlinks) for existing repos
  1179→    if [[ -x "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tools/setup-git-local-excludes.sh" ]]; then
  1180→        print_step "Setting up local git excludes..."
  1181→        local exclude_script="$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tools/setup-git-local-excludes.sh"
  1182→
  1183→        # Setup for ~/work if it exists
  1184→        if [[ -d "$HOME/work" ]]; then
  1185→            "$exclude_script" "$HOME/work" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1186→                log_verbose "Local git excludes configured for ~/work"
  1187→        fi
  1188→
  1189→        # Setup for individual repos: ~/neovim and ~/dotfiles
  1190→        for repo in "$HOME/neovim" "$DOTFILES_ROOT"; do
  1191→            if [[ -d "$repo/.git" ]]; then
  1192→                # Run the script with the parent directory, but it only processes git repos
  1193→                # So we create a temp approach: cd to repo and setup manually
  1194→                local git_exclude="$repo/.git/info/exclude"
  1195→                local gitignore_local="$repo/.gitignore_local"
  1196→
  1197→                # Create info dir if needed
  1198→                [[ ! -d "$repo/.git/info" ]] && mkdir -p "$repo/.git/info"
  1199→
  1200→                # Create exclude file if it doesn't exist
  1201→                if [[ ! -f "$git_exclude" ]]; then
  1202→                    cat >"$git_exclude" <<'EXCLUDE_EOF'
  1203→# Local git excludes - patterns that won't be committed
  1204→# This file is symlinked to .gitignore_local for easy editing
  1205→
  1206→.gitignore_local
  1207→*.local
  1208→.env.local
  1209→.vscode/
  1210→.idea/
  1211→.claude/
  1212→.codex/
  1213→.DS_Store
  1214→*.swp
  1215→*.swo
  1216→*~
  1217→.pyrightconfig.json
  1218→EXCLUDE_EOF
  1219→                fi
  1220→
  1221→                # Create symlink if it doesn't exist
  1222→                if [[ ! -L "$gitignore_local" ]]; then
  1223→                    (cd "$repo" && ln -sf .git/info/exclude .gitignore_local)
  1224→                    log_verbose "Local git excludes configured for $repo"
  1225→                fi
  1226→            fi
  1227→        done
  1228→
  1229→        print_success "Local git excludes configured"
  1230→    fi
  1231→
  1232→    # Setup kubectl abbreviations for Fish (universal variables, one-time setup)
  1233→    if command_exists fish && [[ -f "$HOME/.config/fish/setup/kubectl-abbr-setup.fish" ]]; then
  1234→        print_step "Setting up kubectl abbreviations for Fish..."
  1235→        fish -c 'source ~/.config/fish/setup/kubectl-abbr-setup.fish' 2>/dev/null &&
  1236→            print_success "kubectl abbreviations installed" ||
  1237→            log_verbose "kubectl abbreviations setup skipped"
  1238→    fi
  1239→
  1240→    mark_step_complete "dotfiles"
  1241→}

  1243→phase_9_fonts_and_apps() {
  1244→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
  1245→    [[ $(is_step_complete "fonts_and_apps") == "true" ]] && return 0
  1246→
  1247→    print_header "Phase 9: Fonts & Applications"
  1248→
  1249→    [[ "$SKIP_FONTS_APPS" == "true" ]] && {
  1250→        print_warning "Skipping fonts/apps (flag)"
  1251→        mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
  1252→        return 0
  1253→    }
  1254→
  1255→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
  1256→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping font and GUI application installation"
  1257→        mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
  1258→        return 0
  1259→    fi
  1260→
  1261→    # macOS-specific installations
  1262→    if [[ "$DETECTED_OS" == "macos" ]]; then
  1263→        # Install Nerd Fonts (batch — single brew invocation)
  1264→        print_step "Installing Nerd Fonts..."
  1265→        local fonts=(
  1266→            "font-iosevka-nerd-font"
  1267→            "font-jetbrains-mono-nerd-font"
  1268→            "font-fira-code-nerd-font"
  1269→            "font-hack-nerd-font"
  1270→        )
  1271→        local fonts_to_install=()
  1272→        for font in "${fonts[@]}"; do
  1273→            if pm_is_installed "$font"; then
  1274→                print_success "$font already installed"
  1275→            else
  1276→                fonts_to_install+=("$font")
  1277→            fi
  1278→        done
  1279→        if [[ ${#fonts_to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
  1280→            brew install --cask "${fonts_to_install[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1281→                print_success "Installed ${#fonts_to_install[@]} fonts" ||
  1282→                print_warning "Some fonts failed to install"
  1283→        fi
  1284→
  1285→        # Check for DankMono Nerd Font
  1286→        if fc-list 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "DankMono"; then
  1287→            print_success "DankMono Nerd Font is installed"
  1288→        else
  1289→            print_warning "DankMono Nerd Font not found - install manually from:"
  1290→            echo "  https://github.com/saifulapm/my-fonts"
  1291→            echo "  Then: cp /tmp/my-fonts/DankMono\\ Nerd\\ Font/*.otf ~/Library/Fonts/"
  1292→        fi
  1293→
  1294→        # Install GUI Applications (batch — single brew invocation)
  1295→        print_step "Installing GUI Applications..."
  1296→        local gui_apps=(
  1297→            "raycast"
  1298→            "wezterm"
  1299→            "nikitabobko/tap/aerospace"
  1300→            "amazon-q"
  1301→            "ngrok"
  1302→            "altair-graphql-client"
  1303→        )
  1304→        local apps_to_install=()
  1305→        for app in "${gui_apps[@]}"; do
  1306→            local app_name="${app##*/}"
  1307→            if pm_is_installed "$app_name"; then
  1308→                print_success "$app_name already installed"
  1309→            else
  1310→                apps_to_install+=("$app")
  1311→            fi
  1312→        done
  1313→        if [[ ${#apps_to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
  1314→            brew install --cask "${apps_to_install[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1315→                print_success "Installed ${#apps_to_install[@]} GUI applications" ||
  1316→                log_verbose "Some GUI applications failed to install"
  1317→        fi
  1318→
  1319→        # Execute macOS defaults configuration
  1320→        if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/macos-defaults.sh" ]]; then
  1321→            print_step "Applying macOS system defaults..."
  1322→            bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/macos-defaults.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1323→                print_success "macOS defaults configured (Finder, Dock, developer settings)" ||
  1324→                log_verbose "macOS defaults completed with warnings"
  1325→        fi
  1326→
  1327→        # Setup SSH Key Auto-loading LaunchAgent
  1328→        print_step "Setting up SSH key auto-loading..."
  1329→        local ssh_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.user.ssh-add.plist"
  1330→        local ssh_plist_source="$DOTFILES_ROOT/Library/LaunchAgents/com.user.ssh-add.plist"
  1331→        mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents"
  1332→        if [[ ! -f "$ssh_plist" ]] && [[ -f "$ssh_plist_source" ]]; then
  1333→            cp "$ssh_plist_source" "$ssh_plist"
  1334→            print_success "SSH LaunchAgent installed"
  1335→        fi
  1336→        if [[ -f "$ssh_plist" ]]; then
  1337→            if ! launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "com.user.ssh-add"; then
  1338→                launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$ssh_plist" 2>/dev/null &&
  1339→                    print_success "SSH key auto-loading enabled" ||
  1340→                    log_verbose "SSH LaunchAgent load skipped"
  1341→            fi
  1342→        fi
  1343→
  1344→        # Setup Ticket Queue LaunchAgent (auto-start daemon on login)
  1345→        print_step "Setting up ticket queue daemon..."
  1346→        local queue_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dotfiles.ticket-queue.plist"
  1347→        if [[ -f "$queue_plist" ]]; then
  1348→            if ! launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "com.dotfiles.ticket-queue"; then
  1349→                launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$queue_plist" 2>/dev/null &&
  1350→                    print_success "Ticket queue daemon started" ||
  1351→                    log_verbose "Ticket queue daemon start skipped"
  1352→            else
  1353→                log_verbose "Ticket queue daemon already running"
  1354→            fi
  1355→        fi
  1356→
  1357→        # Setup Mayor LaunchAgent (global coordinator daemon on login)
  1358→        print_step "Setting up mayor daemon..."
  1359→        local mayor_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dotfiles.gwt-mayor.plist"
  1360→        if [[ -f "$mayor_plist" ]]; then
  1361→            if ! launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "com.dotfiles.gwt-mayor"; then
  1362→                launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$mayor_plist" 2>/dev/null &&
  1363→                    print_success "Mayor daemon started" ||
  1364→                    log_verbose "Mayor daemon start skipped"
  1365→            else
  1366→                log_verbose "Mayor daemon already running"
  1367→            fi
  1368→        fi
  1369→
  1370→        # Setup Karabiner-Elements (keyboard remapping)
  1371→        print_step "Setting up Karabiner-Elements..."
  1372→        if [[ -d "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/karabiner" ]]; then
  1373→            mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/karabiner"
  1374→            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json" ]]; then
  1375→                ln -sf "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json" "$HOME/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json" 2>/dev/null &&
  1376→                    print_success "Karabiner-Elements configuration linked" ||
  1377→                    log_verbose "Karabiner config link skipped"
  1378→            fi
  1379→        fi
  1380→
  1381→        # Setup CopyQ clipboard manager
  1382→        if command_exists copyq || [[ -d "/Applications/CopyQ.app" ]]; then
  1383→            print_step "Setting up CopyQ..."
  1384→            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/setup-copyq.sh" ]]; then
  1385→                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/setup-copyq.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1386→                    print_success "CopyQ configured" ||
  1387→                    log_verbose "CopyQ setup completed with warnings"
  1388→            fi
  1389→        fi
  1390→        # Install ClaudeUsage menu bar app (subscription usage tracker)
  1391→        # https://github.com/linuxlewis/claude-usage
  1392→        if [[ -d "/Applications/ClaudeUsage.app" ]]; then
  1393→            print_success "ClaudeUsage already installed"
  1394→        else
  1395→            print_step "Installing ClaudeUsage menu bar app..."
  1396→            local claude_usage_url
  1397→            claude_usage_url=$(curl -sL "https://api.github.com/repos/linuxlewis/claude-usage/releases/latest" |
  1398→                grep -o '"browser_download_url":\s*"[^"]*\.zip"' |

1400→                sed 's/"browser_download_url":\s*"//;s/"$//')
  1401→
  1402→            if [[ -n "$claude_usage_url" ]]; then
  1403→                local claude_usage_tmp="/tmp/ClaudeUsage.zip"
  1404→                if curl -sL "$claude_usage_url" -o "$claude_usage_tmp"; then
  1405→                    unzip -q -o "$claude_usage_tmp" -d /tmp/ClaudeUsage 2>/dev/null
  1406→                    local app_src="/tmp/ClaudeUsage/ClaudeUsage.app"
  1407→                    if [[ ! -d "$app_src" ]]; then
  1408→                        app_src=$(find /tmp/ClaudeUsage -name "ClaudeUsage.app" -maxdepth 2 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  1409→                    fi
  1410→                    if [[ -n "$app_src" && -d "$app_src" ]]; then
  1411→                        xattr -cr "$app_src" 2>/dev/null
  1412→                        codesign --force --deep --sign - "$app_src" 2>/dev/null
  1413→                        mv "$app_src" /Applications/
  1414→                        print_success "ClaudeUsage installed to /Applications/"
  1415→                    else
  1416→                        print_warning "ClaudeUsage.app not found in archive"
  1417→                    fi
  1418→                    rm -rf "$claude_usage_tmp" /tmp/ClaudeUsage
  1419→                else
  1420→                    print_warning "Failed to download ClaudeUsage"
  1421→                fi
  1422→            else
  1423→                print_warning "Failed to fetch ClaudeUsage release URL"
  1424→            fi
  1425→        fi
  1426→    else
  1427→        # Linux/other OS
  1428→        echo "Font and GUI application installation is macOS-specific"
  1429→        log_verbose "Phase 9 operations skipped on $DETECTED_OS (safe to skip)"
  1430→    fi
  1431→
  1432→    mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
  1433→}
