  1093→  1093→phase_7_shells() {
  1094→  1094→    [[ "$SKIP_SHELLS" == "true" ]] && return 0
  1095→  1095→    [[ $(is_step_complete "shells") == "true" ]] && return 0
  1096→  1096→
  1097→  1097→    print_header "Phase 7: Shell Configuration"
  1098→  1098→
  1099→  1099→    install_packages_from_profile "$PROFILE" "shells"
  1100→  1100→
  1101→  1101→    setup_shells_from_profile "$PROFILE"
  1102→  1102→
  1103→  1103→    # Setup Atuin shell history (import existing history)

  1111→  1111→    # Configure Jujutsu (jj) version control

  1115→  1115→            mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/jj"
  1116→  1116→            ln -sf "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/jj/config.toml" "$HOME/.config/jj/config.toml" 2>/dev/null &&
  1117→  1117→                print_success "Jujutsu configuration linked" ||
  1118→  1118→                log_verbose "Jujutsu config will be created by stow"
  1119→  1119→        else
  1120→  1120→            log_verbose "Jujutsu config will be created by stow"
  1121→  1121→        fi
  1122→  1122→    fi
  1123→  1123→
  1124→  1124→    mark_step_complete "shells"
  1125→  1125→}
  1126→  1126→
  1127→  1127→phase_8_dotfiles() {
  1128→  1128→    [[ "$SKIP_DOTFILES" == "true" ]] && return 0
  1129→  1129→    [[ $(is_step_complete "dotfiles") == "true" ]] && return 0
  1130→  1130→
  1131→  1131→    print_header "Phase 8: Dotfiles"
  1132→  1132→
  1133→  1133→    stow_dotfiles
  1134→  1134→
  1135→  1135→    # Configure git template directory for auto-setup hooks (e.g., .gitignore_local)
  1136→  1136→    if command_exists git; then
  1137→  1137→        git config --global init.templateDir ~/.config/git/templates
  1138→  1138→        log_verbose "Git template directory configured"
  1139→  1139→
  1140→  1140→        # Register union-doc merge driver for documentation files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md)
  1141→  1141→        # Prevents merge conflicts when multiple worktrees append to the same doc files
  1142→  1142→        git config --global merge.union-doc.name "Union merge for documentation files"
  1143→  1143→        git config --global merge.union-doc.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-union.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1144→  1144→        log_verbose "Union-doc merge driver registered"
  1145→  1145→
  1146→  1146→        # Register Brewfile merge driver - union merge + dedup of tap/brew/cask/mas
  1147→  1147→        git config --global merge.brewfile.name "Union merge for Brewfile"
  1148→  1148→        git config --global merge.brewfile.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-brewfile.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1149→  1149→        log_verbose "Brewfile merge driver registered"
  1150→  1150→
  1151→  1151→        # Register JSON deep-merge driver for settings files
  1152→  1152→        git config --global merge.json-merge.name "Deep merge for JSON config files"
  1153→  1153→        git config --global merge.json-merge.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-json.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1154→  1154→        log_verbose "JSON merge driver registered"
  1155→  1155→
  1156→  1156→        # Register lockfile merge driver - keeps ours for auto-generated lockfiles
  1157→  1157→        git config --global merge.lockfile.name "Keep ours for lockfiles"
  1158→  1158→        git config --global merge.lockfile.driver "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/merge-driver-lockfile.sh %A %O %B %L %P"
  1159→  1159→        log_verbose "Lockfile merge driver registered"
  1160→  1160→
  1161→  1161→        # Register JSON diff driver - sorts keys for cleaner diffs
  1162→  1162→        git config --global diff.json.textconv "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/git-diff-json.sh"
  1163→  1163→        log_verbose "JSON diff driver registered"
  1164→  1164→
  1165→  1165→        # Register JSON clean filter - normalizes key order on commit
  1166→  1166→        # Prevents phantom diffs from tools that re-serialize JSON (e.g., Claude Code)
  1167→  1167→        git config --global filter.json-normalize.clean "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/git-clean-json.sh"
  1168→  1168→        log_verbose "JSON normalize filter registered"
  1169→  1169→
  1170→  1170→        # Register plist diff driver - converts to XML for readable diffs
  1171→  1171→        git config --global diff.plist.textconv "plutil -convert xml1 -o -"
  1172→  1172→        log_verbose "Plist diff driver registered"
  1173→  1173→    fi
  1174→  1174→
  1175→  1175→    # Setup local git excludes (.gitignore_local symlinks) for existing repos
  1176→  1176→    if [[ -x "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tools/setup-git-local-excludes.sh" ]]; then
  1177→  1177→        print_step "Setting up local git excludes..."
  1178→  1178→        local exclude_script="$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/tools/setup-git-local-excludes.sh"
  1179→  1179→
  1180→  1180→        # Setup for ~/work if it exists
  1181→  1181→        if [[ -d "$HOME/work" ]]; then
  1182→  1182→            "$exclude_script" "$HOME/work" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1183→  1183→                log_verbose "Local git excludes configured for ~/work"
  1184→  1184→        fi
  1185→  1185→
  1186→  1186→        # Setup for individual repos: ~/neovim and ~/dotfiles
  1187→  1187→        for repo in "$HOME/neovim" "$DOTFILES_ROOT"; do
  1188→  1188→            if [[ -d "$repo/.git" ]]; then
  1189→  1189→                # Run the script with the parent directory, but it only processes git repos
  1190→  1190→                # So we create a temp approach: cd to repo and setup manually
  1191→  1191→                local git_exclude="$repo/.git/info/exclude"
  1192→  1192→                local gitignore_local="$repo/.gitignore_local"
  1193→  1193→
  1194→  1194→                # Create info dir if needed
  1195→  1195→                [[ ! -d "$repo/.git/info" ]] && mkdir -p "$repo/.git/info"
  1196→  1196→
  1197→  1197→                # Create exclude file if it doesn't exist
  1198→  1198→                if [[ ! -f "$git_exclude" ]]; then
  1199→  1199→                    cat >"$git_exclude" <<'EXCLUDE_EOF'
  1200→  1200→# Local git excludes - patterns that won't be committed
  1201→  1201→# This file is symlinked to .gitignore_local for easy editing
  1202→  1202→
  1203→  1203→.gitignore_local
  1204→  1204→*.local
  1205→  1205→.env.local
  1206→  1206→.vscode/
  1207→  1207→.idea/
  1208→  1208→.claude/
  1209→  1209→.codex/
  1210→  1210→.DS_Store
  1211→  1211→*.swp
  1212→  1212→*.swo
  1213→  1213→*~
  1214→  1214→.pyrightconfig.json
  1215→  1215→EXCLUDE_EOF
  1216→  1216→                fi
  1217→  1217→
  1218→  1218→                # Create symlink if it doesn't exist
  1219→  1219→                if [[ ! -L "$gitignore_local" ]]; then
  1220→  1220→                    (cd "$repo" && ln -sf .git/info/exclude .gitignore_local)
  1221→  1221→                    log_verbose "Local git excludes configured for $repo"
  1222→  1222→                fi
  1223→  1223→            fi
  1224→  1224→        done
  1225→  1225→
  1226→  1226→        print_success "Local git excludes configured"
  1227→  1227→    fi
  1228→  1228→
  1229→  1229→    # Setup kubectl abbreviations for Fish (universal variables, one-time setup)
  1230→  1230→    if command_exists fish && [[ -f "$HOME/.config/fish/setup/kubectl-abbr-setup.fish" ]]; then
  1231→  1231→        print_step "Setting up kubectl abbreviations for Fish..."
  1232→  1232→        fish -c 'source ~/.config/fish/setup/kubectl-abbr-setup.fish' 2>/dev/null &&
  1233→  1233→            print_success "kubectl abbreviations installed" ||
  1234→  1234→            log_verbose "kubectl abbreviations setup skipped"
  1235→  1235→    fi
  1236→  1236→
  1237→  1237→    mark_step_complete "dotfiles"
  1238→  1238→}

  1240→  1240→phase_9_fonts_and_apps() {
  1241→  1241→    [[ "$SKIP_PACKAGES" == "true" ]] && return 0
  1242→  1242→    [[ $(is_step_complete "fonts_and_apps") == "true" ]] && return 0
  1243→  1243→
  1244→  1244→    print_header "Phase 9: Fonts & Applications"
  1245→  1245→
  1246→  1246→    [[ "$SKIP_FONTS_APPS" == "true" ]] && {
  1247→  1247→        print_warning "Skipping fonts/apps (flag)"
  1248→  1248→        mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
  1249→  1249→        return 0
  1250→  1250→    }
  1251→  1251→
  1252→  1252→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
  1253→  1253→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping font and GUI application installation"
  1254→  1254→        mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
  1255→  1255→        return 0
  1256→  1256→    fi
  1257→  1257→
  1258→  1258→    # macOS-specific installations
  1259→  1259→    if [[ "$DETECTED_OS" == "macos" ]]; then
  1260→  1260→        # Install Nerd Fonts (batch — single brew invocation)
  1261→  1261→        print_step "Installing Nerd Fonts..."
  1262→  1262→        local fonts=(
  1263→  1263→            "font-iosevka-nerd-font"
  1264→  1264→            "font-jetbrains-mono-nerd-font"
  1265→  1265→            "font-fira-code-nerd-font"
  1266→  1266→            "font-hack-nerd-font"
  1267→  1267→        )
  1268→  1268→        local fonts_to_install=()
  1269→  1269→        for font in "${fonts[@]}"; do
  1270→  1270→            if pm_is_installed "$font"; then
  1271→  1271→                print_success "$font already installed"
  1272→  1272→            else
  1273→  1273→                fonts_to_install+=("$font")
  1274→  1274→            fi
  1275→  1275→        done
  1276→  1276→        if [[ ${#fonts_to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
  1277→  1277→            brew install --cask "${fonts_to_install[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1278→  1278→                print_success "Installed ${#fonts_to_install[@]} fonts" ||
  1279→  1279→                print_warning "Some fonts failed to install"
  1280→  1280→        fi
  1281→  1281→
  1282→  1282→        # Check for DankMono Nerd Font
  1283→  1283→        if fc-list 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "DankMono"; then
  1284→  1284→            print_success "DankMono Nerd Font is installed"
  1285→  1285→        else
  1286→  1286→            print_warning "DankMono Nerd Font not found - install manually from:"
  1287→  1287→            echo "  https://github.com/saifulapm/my-fonts"
  1288→  1288→            echo "  Then: cp /tmp/my-fonts/DankMono\\ Nerd\\ Font/*.otf ~/Library/Fonts/"
  1289→  1289→        fi
  1290→  1290→
  1291→  1291→        # Install GUI Applications (batch — single brew invocation)
  1292→  1292→        print_step "Installing GUI Applications..."
  1293→  1293→        local gui_apps=(
  1294→  1294→            "raycast"
  1295→  1295→            "wezterm"
  1296→  1296→            "nikitabobko/tap/aerospace"
  1297→  1297→            "amazon-q"
  1298→  1298→            "ngrok"
  1299→  1299→            "altair-graphql-client"
  1300→  1300→        )
  1301→  1301→        local apps_to_install=()
  1302→  1302→        for app in "${gui_apps[@]}"; do
  1303→  1303→            local app_name="${app##*/}"
  1304→  1304→            if pm_is_installed "$app_name"; then
  1305→  1305→                print_success "$app_name already installed"
  1306→  1306→            else
  1307→  1307→                apps_to_install+=("$app")
  1308→  1308→            fi
  1309→  1309→        done
  1310→  1310→        if [[ ${#apps_to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
  1311→  1311→            brew install --cask "${apps_to_install[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1312→  1312→                print_success "Installed ${#apps_to_install[@]} GUI applications" ||
  1313→  1313→                log_verbose "Some GUI applications failed to install"
  1314→  1314→        fi
  1315→  1315→
  1316→  1316→        # Execute macOS defaults configuration
  1317→  1317→        if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/macos-defaults.sh" ]]; then
  1318→  1318→            print_step "Applying macOS system defaults..."
  1319→  1319→            bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/macos-defaults.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1320→  1320→                print_success "macOS defaults configured (Finder, Dock, developer settings)" ||
  1321→  1321→                log_verbose "macOS defaults completed with warnings"
  1322→  1322→        fi
  1323→  1323→
  1324→  1324→        # Setup SSH Key Auto-loading LaunchAgent
  1325→  1325→        print_step "Setting up SSH key auto-loading..."
  1326→  1326→        local ssh_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.user.ssh-add.plist"
  1327→  1327→        local ssh_plist_source="$DOTFILES_ROOT/Library/LaunchAgents/com.user.ssh-add.plist"
  1328→  1328→        mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents"
  1329→  1329→        if [[ ! -f "$ssh_plist" ]] && [[ -f "$ssh_plist_source" ]]; then
  1330→  1330→            cp "$ssh_plist_source" "$ssh_plist"
  1331→  1331→            print_success "SSH LaunchAgent installed"
  1332→  1332→        fi
  1333→  1333→        if [[ -f "$ssh_plist" ]]; then
  1334→  1334→            if ! launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "com.user.ssh-add"; then
  1335→  1335→                launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$ssh_plist" 2>/dev/null &&
  1336→  1336→                    print_success "SSH key auto-loading enabled" ||
  1337→  1337→                    log_verbose "SSH LaunchAgent load skipped"
  1338→  1338→            fi
  1339→  1339→        fi
  1340→  1340→
  1341→  1341→        # Setup Ticket Queue LaunchAgent (auto-start daemon on login)
  1342→  1342→        print_step "Setting up ticket queue daemon..."
  1343→  1343→        local queue_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dotfiles.ticket-queue.plist"
  1344→  1344→        if [[ -f "$queue_plist" ]]; then
  1345→  1345→            if ! launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "com.dotfiles.ticket-queue"; then
  1346→  1346→                launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$queue_plist" 2>/dev/null &&
  1347→  1347→                    print_success "Ticket queue daemon started" ||
  1348→  1348→                    log_verbose "Ticket queue daemon start skipped"
  1349→  1349→            else
  1350→  1350→                log_verbose "Ticket queue daemon already running"
  1351→  1351→            fi
  1352→  1352→        fi
  1353→  1353→
  1354→  1354→        # Setup Mayor LaunchAgent (global coordinator daemon on login)
  1355→  1355→        print_step "Setting up mayor daemon..."
  1356→  1356→        local mayor_plist="$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dotfiles.gwt-mayor.plist"
  1357→  1357→        if [[ -f "$mayor_plist" ]]; then
  1358→  1358→            if ! launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "com.dotfiles.gwt-mayor"; then
  1359→  1359→                launchctl bootstrap "gui/$(id -u)" "$mayor_plist" 2>/dev/null &&
  1360→  1360→                    print_success "Mayor daemon started" ||
  1361→  1361→                    log_verbose "Mayor daemon start skipped"
  1362→  1362→            else
  1363→  1363→                log_verbose "Mayor daemon already running"
  1364→  1364→            fi
  1365→  1365→        fi
  1366→  1366→
  1367→  1367→        # Setup Karabiner-Elements (keyboard remapping)
  1368→  1368→        print_step "Setting up Karabiner-Elements..."
  1369→  1369→        if [[ -d "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/karabiner" ]]; then
  1370→  1370→            mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/karabiner"
  1371→  1371→            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json" ]]; then
  1372→  1372→                ln -sf "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json" "$HOME/.config/karabiner/karabiner.json" 2>/dev/null &&
  1373→  1373→                    print_success "Karabiner-Elements configuration linked" ||
  1374→  1374→                    log_verbose "Karabiner config link skipped"
  1375→  1375→            fi
  1376→  1376→        fi
  1377→  1377→
  1378→  1378→        # Setup CopyQ clipboard manager
  1379→  1379→        if command_exists copyq || [[ -d "/Applications/CopyQ.app" ]]; then
  1380→  1380→            print_step "Setting up CopyQ..."
  1381→  1381→            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/setup-copyq.sh" ]]; then
  1382→  1382→                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/setup/setup-copyq.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1383→  1383→                    print_success "CopyQ configured" ||
  1384→  1384→                    log_verbose "CopyQ setup completed with warnings"
  1385→  1385→            fi
  1386→  1386→        fi
  1387→  1387→        # Install ClaudeUsage menu bar app (subscription usage tracker)
  1388→  1388→        # https://github.com/linuxlewis/claude-usage
  1389→  1389→        if [[ -d "/Applications/ClaudeUsage.app" ]]; then
  1390→  1390→            print_success "ClaudeUsage already installed"
  1391→  1391→        else
  1392→  1392→            print_step "Installing ClaudeUsage menu bar app..."
  1393→  1393→            local claude_usage_url
  1394→  1394→            claude_usage_url=$(curl -sL "https://api.github.com/repos/linuxlewis/claude-usage/releases/latest" |
  1395→  1395→                grep -o '"browser_download_url":\s*"[^"]*\.zip"' |
  1396→  1396→                head -1 |
  1397→  1397→                sed 's/"browser_download_url":\s*"//;s/"$//')
  1398→  1398→
  1399→  1399→            if [[ -n "$claude_usage_url" ]]; then
  1400→  1400→                local claude_usage_tmp="/tmp/ClaudeUsage.zip"
  1401→  1401→                if curl -sL "$claude_usage_url" -o "$claude_usage_tmp"; then
  1402→  1402→                    unzip -q -o "$claude_usage_tmp" -d /tmp/ClaudeUsage 2>/dev/null
  1403→  1403→                    local app_src="/tmp/ClaudeUsage/ClaudeUsage.app"
  1404→  1404→                    if [[ ! -d "$app_src" ]]; then
  1405→  1405→                        app_src=$(find /tmp/ClaudeUsage -name "ClaudeUsage.app" -maxdepth 2 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  1406→  1406→                    fi
  1407→  1407→                    if [[ -n "$app_src" && -d "$app_src" ]]; then
  1408→  1408→                        xattr -cr "$app_src" 2>/dev/null
  1409→  1409→                        codesign --force --deep --sign - "$app_src" 2>/dev/null
  1410→  1410→                        mv "$app_src" /Applications/
  1411→  1411→                        print_success "ClaudeUsage installed to /Applications/"
  1412→  1412→                    else
  1413→  1413→                        print_warning "ClaudeUsage.app not found in archive"
  1414→  1414→                    fi
  1415→  1415→                    rm -rf "$claude_usage_tmp" /tmp/ClaudeUsage
  1416→  1416→                else
  1417→  1417→                    print_warning "Failed to download ClaudeUsage"
  1418→  1418→                fi
  1419→  1419→            else
  1420→  1420→                print_warning "Failed to fetch ClaudeUsage release URL"
  1421→  1421→            fi
  1422→  1422→        fi
  1423→  1423→    else
  1424→  1424→        # Linux/other OS
  1425→  1425→        echo "Font and GUI application installation is macOS-specific"
  1426→  1426→        log_verbose "Phase 9 operations skipped on $DETECTED_OS (safe to skip)"
  1427→  1427→    fi
  1428→  1428→
  1429→  1429→    mark_step_complete "fonts_and_apps"
  1430→  1430→}
  1431→  1431→
  1432→  1432→phase_10_advanced_features() {
  1433→  1433→    [[ $(is_step_complete "advanced_features") == "true" ]] && return 0
  1434→  1434→
  1435→  1435→    print_header "Phase 10: Advanced Features"
  1436→  1436→
  1437→  1437→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
  1438→  1438→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping Kubernetes init, cargo installs, and repo cloning"
  1439→  1439→        mark_step_complete "advanced_features"
  1440→  1440→        return 0
  1441→  1441→    fi
  1442→  1442→
  1443→  1443→    # Kubernetes initialization
  1444→  1444→    if command_exists kubectl; then
  1445→  1445→        print_step "Initializing Kubernetes configuration..."
  1446→  1446→        mkdir -p "$HOME/.kube"
  1447→  1447→        touch "$HOME/.kube/config"
  1448→  1448→        chmod 600 "$HOME/.kube/config"
  1449→  1449→
  1450→  1450→        # Initialize kubelogin for Azure (if installed)
  1451→  1451→        if command_exists kubelogin; then
  1452→  1452→            kubelogin convert-kubeconfig >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1453→  1453→                print_success "Azure kubelogin initialized" ||
  1454→  1454→                log_verbose "kubelogin initialization skipped"
  1455→  1455→        fi
  1456→  1456→        print_success "Kubernetes configuration initialized"
  1457→  1457→    fi
  1458→  1458→
  1459→  1459→    # Rust tools installation (skip if binaries already exist)
  1460→  1460→    if command_exists cargo; then
  1461→  1461→        local cargo_to_install=()
  1462→  1462→        command_exists stylua || cargo_to_install+=(stylua)
  1463→  1463→        command_exists s3grep || cargo_to_install+=(s3grep)
  1464→  1464→
  1465→  1465→        if [[ ${#cargo_to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
  1466→  1466→            print_step "Installing Rust development tools: ${cargo_to_install[*]}..."
  1467→  1467→            cargo install "${cargo_to_install[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1468→  1468→                print_success "Rust tools installed (${cargo_to_install[*]})" ||
  1469→  1469→                log_verbose "Rust tools installation completed with warnings"
  1470→  1470→        else
  1471→  1471→            print_success "Rust tools already installed (stylua, s3grep)"
  1472→  1472→        fi
  1473→  1473→    fi
  1474→  1474→
  1475→  1475→    # Personal repositories (optional - check for SSH key)
  1476→  1476→    if [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_rsa" ]] || [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]]; then
  1477→  1477→        print_step "Cloning personal repositories..."
  1478→  1478→
  1479→  1479→        # Clone Obsidian vault (if configured)
  1480→  1480→        local obsidian_repo="${OBSIDIAN_REPO:-}"
  1481→  1481→        if [[ -n "$obsidian_repo" ]] && [[ ! -d "$HOME/obsidian" ]]; then
  1482→  1482→            git clone "$obsidian_repo" "$HOME/obsidian" 2>/dev/null &&
  1483→  1483→                print_success "Obsidian vault cloned" ||
  1484→  1484→                log_verbose "Obsidian vault clone skipped"
  1485→  1485→        fi
  1486→  1486→
  1487→  1487→        # Clone personal Neovim config (if configured)
  1488→  1488→        local nvim_repo="${NVIM_REPO:-}"
  1489→  1489→        if [[ -n "$nvim_repo" ]] && [[ ! -d "$HOME/neovim" ]]; then
  1490→  1490→            print_step "Cloning personal Neovim configuration..."
  1491→  1491→            git clone "$nvim_repo" "$HOME/neovim" 2>/dev/null &&
  1492→  1492→                print_success "Personal Neovim config cloned to ~/neovim" ||
  1493→  1493→                log_verbose "Neovim config clone skipped"
  1494→  1494→
  1495→  1495→            # Create symlink in home directory (manual symlink, not managed by stow)
  1496→  1496→            if [[ -d "$HOME/neovim" ]]; then
  1497→  1497→                if [[ ! -L "$HOME/.config/nvim" ]]; then
  1498→  1498→                    ln -sf "$HOME/neovim" "$HOME/.config/nvim"
  1499→  1499→                    print_success "Created symlink: ~/.config/nvim → ~/neovim"
  1500→  1500→                fi
  1501→  1501→
  1502→  1502→                # Trust mise configuration if mise is installed
  1503→  1503→                if command -v mise &>/dev/null && [[ -f "$HOME/neovim/mise.toml" ]]; then
  1504→  1504→                    mise trust "$HOME/neovim/mise.toml" &>/dev/null &&
  1505→  1505→                        print_success "Trusted mise configuration for Neovim" ||
  1506→  1506→                        log_verbose "mise trust skipped"
  1507→  1507→                fi
  1508→  1508→
  1509→  1509→                # Configure persistent mise settings (only needed once, not every shell startup)
  1510→  1510→                if command -v mise &>/dev/null; then
  1511→  1511→                    mise settings add idiomatic_version_file_enable_tools ruby 2>/dev/null &&
  1512→  1512→                        print_success "Configured mise idiomatic version file for Ruby" ||
  1513→  1513→                        log_verbose "mise settings already configured"
  1514→  1514→                fi
  1515→  1515→            fi
  1516→  1516→        fi
  1517→  1517→    else
  1518→  1518→        log_verbose "No SSH keys found, skipping personal repository cloning"
  1519→  1519→    fi
  1520→  1520→
  1521→  1521→    # Devcontainer Neovim Environment Setup
  1522→  1522→    # Sets up persistent directory structure for Neovim in devcontainers
  1523→  1523→    print_step "Setting up devcontainer Neovim environment..."
  1524→  1524→    local devcontainer_env="$HOME/.devcontainer/env"
  1525→  1525→
  1526→  1526→    # Create directory structure
  1527→  1527→    mkdir -p "$devcontainer_env/.config" "$devcontainer_env/.cache" "$devcontainer_env/.local"
  1528→  1528→
  1529→  1529→    # Symlink Neovim config if ~/neovim exists and not already linked
  1530→  1530→    if [[ -d "$HOME/neovim" ]] && [[ ! -L "$devcontainer_env/.config/nvim" ]]; then
  1531→  1531→        ln -sf "$HOME/neovim" "$devcontainer_env/.config/nvim"
  1532→  1532→        print_success "Linked: ~/.devcontainer/env/.config/nvim -> ~/neovim"
  1533→  1533→    elif [[ -L "$devcontainer_env/.config/nvim" ]]; then
  1534→  1534→        log_verbose "Devcontainer Neovim config already linked"
  1535→  1535→    else
  1536→  1536→        log_verbose "~/neovim not found - devcontainer will use empty config"
  1537→  1537→    fi
  1538→  1538→
  1539→  1539→    print_success "Devcontainer environment ready at ~/.devcontainer/env"
  1540→  1540→
  1541→  1541→    # Pre-export Claude Code credentials for devcontainer auto-login
  1542→  1542→    # Extracts OAuth tokens from macOS Keychain so devcontainers can authenticate automatically
  1543→  1543→    local export_script="$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/devcontainer/export-claude-credentials.sh"
  1544→  1544→    if [[ -f "$export_script" ]] && [[ "$(uname)" == "Darwin" ]]; then
  1545→  1545→        print_step "Exporting Claude Code credentials for devcontainer auto-login..."
  1546→  1546→        if bash "$export_script" 2>/dev/null; then
  1547→  1547→            print_success "Claude Code credentials exported to shared directory"
  1548→  1548→        else
  1549→  1549→            print_warning "No Claude Code credentials found - run 'claude login' first"
  1550→  1550→        fi
  1551→  1551→    fi
  1552→  1552→
  1553→  1553→    # Install devcontainer.vim (universal Neovim for any devcontainer)
  1554→  1554→    if command_exists go && [[ ! -f "$HOME/go/bin/devcontainer.vim" ]]; then
  1555→  1555→        print_step "Installing devcontainer.vim..."
  1556→  1556→        go install github.com/mikoto2000/devcontainer.vim@latest >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1557→  1557→            print_success "devcontainer.vim installed" ||
  1558→  1558→            print_warning "devcontainer.vim installation failed (requires Go)"
  1559→  1559→    elif [[ -f "$HOME/go/bin/devcontainer.vim" ]]; then
  1560→  1560→        log_verbose "devcontainer.vim already installed"
  1561→  1561→    fi
  1562→  1562→
  1563→  1563→    # Symlink claude-code-plugins devcontainer config from dotfiles
  1564→  1564→    # This ensures Neovim-enabled devcontainer config persists across plugin updates
  1565→  1565→    local claude_plugins_devcontainer="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-code-plugins/.devcontainer"
  1566→  1566→    local dotfiles_devcontainer="$DOTFILES_ROOT/devcontainer/claude-code-plugins"
  1567→  1567→    if [[ -d "$dotfiles_devcontainer" ]] && [[ ! -L "$claude_plugins_devcontainer" ]]; then
  1568→  1568→        print_step "Linking claude-code-plugins devcontainer config..."
  1569→  1569→        rm -rf "$claude_plugins_devcontainer" 2>/dev/null || true
  1570→  1570→        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$claude_plugins_devcontainer")"
  1571→  1571→        ln -sf "$dotfiles_devcontainer" "$claude_plugins_devcontainer"
  1572→  1572→        print_success "claude-code-plugins devcontainer linked from dotfiles"
  1573→  1573→    elif [[ -L "$claude_plugins_devcontainer" ]]; then
  1574→  1574→        log_verbose "claude-code-plugins devcontainer already linked"
  1575→  1575→    fi
  1576→  1576→
  1577→  1577→    # Vault Semantic Search Setup (smart embeddings)
  1578→  1578→    # Runs independently of SSH keys - only requires ~/obsidian to exist
  1579→  1579→    if [[ -d "$HOME/obsidian" ]]; then
  1580→  1580→        local venv_dir="$DOTFILES_ROOT/.venv/vault-search"
  1581→  1581→
  1582→  1582→        # Check if already set up (venv exists and has sentence-transformers)
  1583→  1583→        if [[ -d "$venv_dir" ]] && "$venv_dir/bin/python" -c "import sentence_transformers" 2>/dev/null; then
  1584→  1584→            log_verbose "Vault semantic search already configured"
  1585→  1585→        else
  1586→  1586→            print_step "Setting up Obsidian vault semantic search..."
  1587→  1587→            if "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/smart-connections/setup-vault-search.sh" "$HOME/obsidian" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1588→  1588→                print_success "Vault semantic search configured"
  1589→  1589→            else
  1590→  1590→                print_warning "Vault semantic search setup failed (non-critical)"
  1591→  1591→            fi
  1592→  1592→        fi
  1593→  1593→    fi
  1594→  1594→
  1595→  1595→    mark_step_complete "advanced_features"
  1596→  1596→}
  1597→  1597→
  1598→  1598→phase_11_optional_features() {
  1599→  1599→    [[ $(is_step_complete "optional_features") == "true" ]] && return 0

1600→  1600→
  1601→  1601→    # Only run if explicitly enabled via environment variables
  1602→  1602→    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
  1603→  1603→        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features"
  1604→  1604→        print_warning "DRY RUN: Skipping optional Nix/Pulse installations"
  1605→  1605→        mark_step_complete "optional_features"
  1606→  1606→        return 0
  1607→  1607→    fi
  1608→  1608→    if [[ "${ENABLE_NIX:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
  1609→  1609→        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features - Nix Package Manager"
  1610→  1610→
  1611→  1611→        if ! command_exists nix; then
  1612→  1612→            print_step "Installing Nix package manager (Determinate Systems installer)..."
  1613→  1613→            # Use Determinate Systems installer for better macOS support
  1614→  1614→            if curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf -L https://install.determinate.systems/nix | sh -s -- install --no-confirm </dev/null; then
  1615→  1615→                print_success "Nix package manager installed"
  1616→  1616→                # Source Nix for current session
  1617→  1617→                [[ -f '/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/etc/profile.d/nix-daemon.sh' ]] &&
  1618→  1618→                    source '/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/etc/profile.d/nix-daemon.sh'
  1619→  1619→            else
  1620→  1620→                print_warning "Nix installation failed - install manually from https://nixos.org/download"
  1621→  1621→            fi
  1622→  1622→        fi
  1623→  1623→
  1624→  1624→        # Configure Nix
  1625→  1625→        if command_exists nix; then
  1626→  1626→            print_step "Configuring Nix..."
  1627→  1627→            mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/nix"
  1628→  1628→
  1629→  1629→            # Create nix.conf with flakes and experimental features
  1630→  1630→            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.config/nix/nix.conf" ]]; then
  1631→  1631→                cat >"$HOME/.config/nix/nix.conf" <<'EOF'
  1632→  1632→# Enable experimental features
  1633→  1633→experimental-features = nix-command flakes
  1634→  1634→
  1635→  1635→# Build settings
  1636→  1636→max-jobs = auto
  1637→  1637→cores = 0
  1638→  1638→sandbox = true
  1639→  1639→
  1640→  1640→# Substituters (binary caches)
  1641→  1641→substituters = https://cache.nixos.org https://nix-community.cachix.org
  1642→  1642→trusted-public-keys = cache.nixos.org-1:REDACTED nix-community.cachix.org-1:REDACTED/rkCWyvRCYg3Fs=
  1643→  1643→
  1644→  1644→# Garbage collection
  1645→  1645→keep-outputs = true
  1646→  1646→keep-derivations = true
  1647→  1647→EOF
  1648→  1648→                print_success "Nix configuration created"
  1649→  1649→            fi
  1650→  1650→
  1651→  1651→            # Configure trusted users for Determinate Systems installer (macOS)
  1652→  1652→            if [[ "$DETECTED_OS" == "macos" ]] && [[ -f "/etc/nix/nix.custom.conf" ]]; then
  1653→  1653→                if ! sudo grep -q "^trusted-users.*@admin" /etc/nix/nix.custom.conf 2>/dev/null; then
  1654→  1654→                    print_step "Adding @admin to Nix trusted users..."
  1655→  1655→                    echo "trusted-users = root @admin" | sudo tee -a /etc/nix/nix.custom.conf >/dev/null
  1656→  1656→                    # Restart Nix daemon
  1657→  1657→                    if sudo launchctl list | grep -q "systems.determinate.nix-daemon"; then
  1658→  1658→                        sudo launchctl kickstart -k system/systems.determinate.nix-daemon
  1659→  1659→                    fi
  1660→  1660→                fi
  1661→  1661→            fi
  1662→  1662→
  1663→  1663→            # Setup Home Manager
  1664→  1664→            print_step "Setting up Home Manager..."
  1665→  1665→            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.config/home-manager/flake.nix" ]]; then
  1666→  1666→                # Symlink Home Manager configuration from dotfiles if it exists
  1667→  1667→                if [[ -d "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/home-manager" ]]; then
  1668→  1668→                    rm -rf "$HOME/.config/home-manager" 2>/dev/null || true
  1669→  1669→                    ln -sf "$DOTFILES_ROOT/.config/home-manager" "$HOME/.config/home-manager"
  1670→  1670→                    print_success "Home Manager configuration symlinked from dotfiles"
  1671→  1671→                else
  1672→  1672→                    print_warning "Home Manager configuration not found in dotfiles"
  1673→  1673→                fi
  1674→  1674→            fi
  1675→  1675→
  1676→  1676→            # Activate Home Manager if config exists
  1677→  1677→            if [[ -f "$HOME/.config/home-manager/flake.nix" ]]; then
  1678→  1678→                print_step "Activating Home Manager configuration..."
  1679→  1679→                if (cd "$HOME/.config/home-manager" && nix run . -- switch --flake .#default --impure 2>/dev/null); then
  1680→  1680→                    print_success "Home Manager activated for user: $USER"
  1681→  1681→                else
  1682→  1682→                    print_warning "Home Manager activation failed - run 'hm-switch' manually after restarting shell"
  1683→  1683→                fi
  1684→  1684→            fi
  1685→  1685→
  1686→  1686→            # Setup Nix LSP hybrid mode
  1687→  1687→            print_step "Configuring Nix LSP hybrid setup..."
  1688→  1688→
  1689→  1689→            # Install global LSPs
  1690→  1690→            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/install-lsps-global.sh" ]]; then
  1691→  1691→                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/install-lsps-global.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1692→  1692→                    log_verbose "Global LSPs installed"
  1693→  1693→            fi
  1694→  1694→
  1695→  1695→            # Activate hybrid mode
  1696→  1696→            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/activate-nix-lsps.sh" ]]; then
  1697→  1697→                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/activate-nix-lsps.sh" hybrid >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1698→  1698→                    log_verbose "Nix LSP hybrid mode activated"
  1699→  1699→            fi
  1700→  1700→
  1701→  1701→            # Check LSP status
  1702→  1702→            if [[ -f "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/check-lsp-status.sh" ]]; then
  1703→  1703→                bash "$DOTFILES_ROOT/scripts/check-lsp-status.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
  1704→  1704→                    print_success "Nix LSP hybrid setup complete"
  1705→  1705→            fi
  1706→  1706→        fi
  1707→  1707→    fi
  1708→  1708→
  1709→  1709→    if [[ "${ENABLE_PULSE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
  1710→  1710→        print_header "Phase 11: Optional Features - Pulse Coding Tracker"
  1711→  1711→
  1712→  1712→        # Start Redis service (required for Pulse)
  1713→  1713→        print_step "Starting Redis service..."
  1714→  1714→        if command_exists brew; then
  1715→  1715→            brew services start redis 2>/dev/null || log_verbose "Redis service may already be running"
  1716→  1716→            print_success "Redis service started"
  1717→  1717→        elif command_exists systemctl; then
  1718→  1718→            sudo systemctl enable redis 2>/dev/null || true
  1719→  1719→            sudo systemctl start redis 2>/dev/null || true
  1720→  1720→            print_success "Redis service started (systemd)"
  1721→  1721→        else
  1722→  1722→            print_warning "Cannot start Redis service automatically"
  1723→  1723→        fi
  1724→  1724→
  1725→  1725→        # Build and install Pulse binaries
  1726→  1726→        if ! command_exists pulse-server || ! command_exists pulse-client; then
  1727→  1727→            print_step "Building Pulse from source..."
  1728→  1728→
  1729→  1729→            if ! command_exists go; then
  1730→  1730→                print_warning "Go not installed - cannot build Pulse. Install with: brew install go"
  1731→  1731→            else
  1732→  1732→                local pulse_dir="/tmp/pulse-build"
  1733→  1733→                rm -rf "$pulse_dir"
  1734→  1734→                mkdir -p "$HOME/bin"
  1735→  1735→
  1736→  1736→                if git clone https://github.com/viccon/pulse.git "$pulse_dir" 2>/dev/null; then
  1737→  1737→                    cd "$pulse_dir" || true
  1738→  1738→                    if go build -o pulse-server ./cmd/server 2>/dev/null &&
  1739→  1739→                        go build -o pulse-client ./cmd/client 2>/dev/null; then
  1740→  1740→                        cp pulse-server "$HOME/bin/"
  1741→  1741→                        cp pulse-client "$HOME/bin/"
  1742→  1742→                        chmod +x "$HOME/bin/pulse-server" "$HOME/bin/pulse-client"
  1743→  1743→                        print_success "Pulse binaries installed to ~/bin/"
  1744→  1744→                    else
  1745→  1745→                        print_warning "Failed to build Pulse binaries"
  1746→  1746→                    fi
  1747→  1747→                    cd - >/dev/null || true
  1748→  1748→                    rm -rf "$pulse_dir"
  1749→  1749→                else
  1750→  1750→                    print_warning "Failed to clone Pulse repository"
  1751→  1751→                fi
  1752→  1752→            fi
  1753→  1753→        else
  1754→  1754→            log_verbose "Pulse binaries already installed"
  1755→  1755→        fi
  1756→  1756→
  1757→  1757→        # Create Pulse configuration
  1758→  1758→        if command_exists pulse-server || [[ -f "$HOME/bin/pulse-server" ]]; then
  1759→  1759→            print_step "Configuring Pulse..."
  1760→  1760→            mkdir -p "$HOME/.pulse/logs" "$HOME/.pulse/data"
  1761→  1761→
  1762→  1762→            # Create config.yaml if not exists
  1763→  1763→            if [[ ! -f "$HOME/.pulse/config.yaml" ]]; then
  1764→  1764→                cat >"$HOME/.pulse/config.yaml" <<'EOF'
  1765→  1765→server:
  1766→  1766→  name: "pulse-server"
  1767→  1767→  host: "127.0.0.1"
  1768→  1768→  port: 8080
  1769→  1769→
  1770→  1770→redis:
  1771→  1771→  host: localhost
  1772→  1772→  port: 6379
  1773→  1773→  db: 0
  1774→  1774→
  1775→  1775→tracking:
  1776→  1776→  auto_start: true
  1777→  1777→  idle_timeout: 300
  1778→  1778→  save_interval: 60
  1779→  1779→
  1780→  1780→projects:
  1781→  1781→  default_root: ~/code
  1782→  1782→EOF
  1783→  1783→                chmod 600 "$HOME/.pulse/config.yaml"
  1784→  1784→                print_success "Pulse configuration created"
  1785→  1785→            else
  1786→  1786→                log_verbose "Pulse configuration already exists"
  1787→  1787→            fi
  1788→  1788→
  1789→  1789→            # Setup daemon (OS-specific)
  1790→  1790→            local pulse_binary
  1791→  1791→            if [[ -f "$HOME/bin/pulse-server" ]]; then
  1792→  1792→                pulse_binary="$HOME/bin/pulse-server"
  1793→  1793→            else
  1794→  1794→                pulse_binary="$(which pulse-server 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
  1795→  1795→            fi
  1796→  1796→

  1930→  1930→# ============================================================================
  1931→  1931→# Main
  1932→  1932→# ============================================================================
  1933→  1933→
  1934→  1934→main() {
  1935→  1935→    parse_args "$@"
  1936→  1936→    load_modules
  1937→  1937→
  1938→  1938→    # Clear completion state if requested (after modules load STATE_DIR)
  1939→  1939→    if [[ "${RESET_STATE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
  1940→  1940→        print_warning "Clearing completion state — all phases will re-run"
  1941→  1941→        clear_state
  1942→  1942→    fi
  1943→  1943→
  1944→  1944→    preflight_checks
  1945→  1945→    show_summary
  1946→  1946→
  1947→  1947→    # Run installation phases
  1948→  1948→    # Phases 1-4: sequential (each may depend on packages from earlier phases)
  1949→  1949→    phase_1_core_packages
  1950→  1950→    phase_2_cli_tools
  1951→  1951→    phase_3_development
  1952→  1952→    phase_4_cloud_tools
  1953→  1953→
  1954→  1954→    # Phases 5-6: parallel (editors and multiplexer are independent)
  1955→  1955→    # Buffer output per phase to prevent interleaved terminal output
  1956→  1956→    local phase_fail=0
  1957→  1957→    phase_5_editors >"$LOG_DIR/phase5.out" 2>&1 &
  1958→  1958→    local pid_5=$!
  1959→  1959→    phase_6_multiplexer >"$LOG_DIR/phase6.out" 2>&1 &
  1960→  1960→    local pid_6=$!
  1961→  1961→    wait "$pid_5" || phase_fail=1
  1962→  1962→    wait "$pid_6" || phase_fail=1
  1963→  1963→    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase5.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
  1964→  1964→    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase6.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
  1965→  1965→    [[ $phase_fail -ne 0 ]] && print_warning "Some parallel phases (5-6) had errors — check log for details"
  1966→  1966→
  1967→  1967→    # Phases 7-8: sequential (shells setup writes to ~/.config/fish which stow also manages)
  1968→  1968→    phase_7_shells
  1969→  1969→    phase_8_dotfiles
  1970→  1970→
  1971→  1971→    # Phase 9-10: parallel (fonts/apps and advanced features are independent)
  1972→  1972→    phase_fail=0
  1973→  1973→    phase_9_fonts_and_apps >"$LOG_DIR/phase9.out" 2>&1 &
  1974→  1974→    local pid_9=$!
  1975→  1975→    phase_10_advanced_features >"$LOG_DIR/phase10.out" 2>&1 &
  1976→  1976→    local pid_10=$!
  1977→  1977→    wait "$pid_9" || phase_fail=1
  1978→  1978→    wait "$pid_10" || phase_fail=1
  1979→  1979→    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase9.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
  1980→  1980→    cat "$LOG_DIR/phase10.out" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
  1981→  1981→    [[ $phase_fail -ne 0 ]] && print_warning "Some parallel phases (9-10) had errors — check log for details"
  1982→  1982→
  1983→  1983→    phase_11_optional_features
  1984→  1984→
  1985→  1985→    # Success
  1986→  1986→    print_header "Setup Complete!"
  1987→  1987→
  1988→  1988→    echo "Installation Summary:"
  1989→  1989→    echo "  OS: $DETECTED_OS"
  1990→  1990→    echo "  Profile: $PROFILE"
  1991→  1991→    echo "  Mode: $DETECTED_MODE"
  1992→  1992→    echo ""
  1993→  1993→    echo "Next Steps:"
  1994→  1994→    echo "  1. Restart your shell (or run: exec fish / source ~/.bashrc)"
  1995→  1995→    echo "  2. If using tmux: Start tmux and press Ctrl-s + I to install plugins"
  1996→  1996→    echo "  3. If using Neovim: Run 'nvim' to complete plugin installation"
  1997→  1997→    echo ""
  1998→  1998→    echo "Log file: $LOG_FILE"
  1999→  1999→    echo ""
  2000→  2000→    print_success "Setup complete"
  2001→  2001→}
  2002→  2002→
